`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-2) import re [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-3) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode, ProxyConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-4) from crawl4ai.proxy_strategy import RoundRobinProxyStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-6) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-7)     # Load proxies from environment [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-8)     proxies = ProxyConfig.from_env() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-9)     if not proxies: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-10)         print("No proxies found! Set PROXIES environment variable.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-11)         return [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-13)     # Create rotation strategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-14)     proxy_strategy = RoundRobinProxyStrategy(proxies) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-16)     # Configure per-request with proxy rotation [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-17)     browser_config = BrowserConfig(headless=True, verbose=False) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-18)     run_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-19)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-20)         proxy_rotation_strategy=proxy_strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-21)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-22) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-23)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_config) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-24)         urls = ["https://httpbin.org/ip"] * (len(proxies) * 2)  # Test each proxy twice [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-26)         print(f"🚀 Testing {len(proxies)} proxies with rotation...") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-27)         results = await crawler.arun_many(urls=urls, config=run_config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-28) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-29)         for i, result in enumerate(results): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-30)             if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-31)                 # Extract IP from response [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-32)                 ip_match = re.search(r'(?:[0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}', result.html) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-33)                 if ip_match: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-34)                     detected_ip = ip_match.group(0) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-35)                     proxy_index = i % len(proxies) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-36)                     expected_ip = proxies[proxy_index].ip [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-37) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-38)                     print(f"✅ Request {i+1}: Proxy {proxy_index+1} -> IP {detected_ip}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-39)                     if detected_ip == expected_ip: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-40)                         print("   🎯 IP matches proxy configuration") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-41)                     else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-42)                         print(f"   ⚠️  IP mismatch (expected {expected_ip})") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-43)                 else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-44)                     print(f"❌ Request {i+1}: Could not extract IP from response") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-45)             else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-46)                 print(f"❌ Request {i+1}: Failed - {result.error_message}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-47) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-48) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-4-49)     asyncio.run(main())`

SSL Certificate Analysis
------------------------

Combine proxy usage with SSL certificate inspection for enhanced security analysis. SSL certificate fetching is configured per request via `CrawlerRunConfig`.

### Per-Request SSL Certificate Analysis

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-4) run_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-5)     proxy_config={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-6)         "server": "http://proxy.example.com:8080", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-7)         "username": "user", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-8)         "password": "pass", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-9)     }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-10)     fetch_ssl_certificate=True,  # Enable SSL certificate analysis for this request [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-11) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-14) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-15)     browser_config = BrowserConfig() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-16)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_config) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-17)         result = await crawler.arun(url="https://example.com", config=run_config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-19)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-20)             print(f"✅ Crawled via proxy: {result.url}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-21) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-22)             # Analyze SSL certificate [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-23)             if result.ssl_certificate: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-24)                 cert = result.ssl_certificate [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-25)                 print("🔒 SSL Certificate Info:") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-26)                 print(f"   Issuer: {cert.issuer}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-27)                 print(f"   Subject: {cert.subject}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-28)                 print(f"   Valid until: {cert.valid_until}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-29)                 print(f"   Fingerprint: {cert.fingerprint}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-30) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-31)                 # Export certificate [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-32)                 cert.to_json("certificate.json") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-33)                 print("💾 Certificate exported to certificate.json") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-34)             else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-35)                 print("⚠️  No SSL certificate information available") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-36) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-37) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-38) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-5-39)     asyncio.run(main())`

Security Best Practices
-----------------------

### 1\. Proxy Rotation for Anonymity

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-1) from crawl4ai import CrawlerRunConfig, ProxyConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-2) from crawl4ai.proxy_strategy import RoundRobinProxyStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-4) # Use multiple proxies to avoid IP blocking [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-5) proxies = ProxyConfig.from_env("PROXIES") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-6) strategy = RoundRobinProxyStrategy(proxies) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-7) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-8) # Configure rotation per request (recommended) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-9) run_config = CrawlerRunConfig(proxy_rotation_strategy=strategy) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-11) # For a fixed proxy across all requests, just reuse the same run_config instance [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-6-12) static_run_config = run_config`

### 2\. SSL Certificate Verification

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-7-1) from crawl4ai import CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-7-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-7-3) # Always verify SSL certificates when possible [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-7-4) # Per-request (affects specific requests) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-7-5) run_config = CrawlerRunConfig(fetch_ssl_certificate=True)`

### 3\. Environment Variable Security

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-8-1) # Use environment variables for sensitive proxy credentials [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-8-2) # Avoid hardcoding usernames/passwords in code [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-8-3) export PROXIES="ip1:port1:user1:pass1,ip2:port2:user2:pass2"`

### 4\. SOCKS5 for Enhanced Security

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-9-1) from crawl4ai import CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-9-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-9-3) # Prefer SOCKS5 proxies for better protocol support [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-9-4) run_config = CrawlerRunConfig(proxy_config="socks5://proxy.example.com:1080")`

Migration from Deprecated `proxy` Parameter
-------------------------------------------

*   "Deprecation Notice" The legacy `proxy` argument on `BrowserConfig` is deprecated. Configure proxies through `CrawlerRunConfig.proxy_config` so each request fully describes its network settings.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-1) # Old (deprecated) approach [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-2) # from crawl4ai import BrowserConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-3) # browser_config = BrowserConfig(proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-5) # New (preferred) approach [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-6) from crawl4ai import CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-10-7) run_config = CrawlerRunConfig(proxy_config="http://proxy.example.com:8080")`

### Safe Logging of Proxies

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-11-1) from crawl4ai import ProxyConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-11-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-11-3) def safe_proxy_repr(proxy: ProxyConfig): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-11-4)     if getattr(proxy, "username", None): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-11-5)         return f"{proxy.server} (auth: ****)" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/#__codelineno-11-6)     return proxy.server`

Troubleshooting
---------------

### Common Issues

*   "Proxy connection failed"
    
    *   Verify the proxy server is reachable from your network.
    *   Double-check authentication credentials.
    *   Ensure the protocol matches (`http`, `https`, or `socks5`).
*   "SSL certificate errors"
    
    *   Some proxies break SSL inspection; switch proxies if you see repeated failures.
    *   Consider temporarily disabling certificate fetching to isolate the issue.
*   "Environment variables not loading"
    
    *   Confirm `PROXIES` (or your custom env var) is set before running the script.
    *   Check formatting: `ip:port:user:pass,ip:port:user:pass`.
*   "Proxy rotation not working"
    
    *   Ensure `ProxyConfig.from_env()` actually loaded entries (`len(proxies) > 0`).
    *   Attach `proxy_rotation_strategy` to `CrawlerRunConfig`.
    *   Validate the proxy definitions you pass into the strategy.

See Also
--------

*   [Anti-Bot Detection & Fallback](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/anti-bot-and-fallback/)
     — Automatic retry with proxy escalation and fallback functions when anti-bot blocking is detected

* * *

\> Feedback

---

# SSL Certificate - Crawl4AI Documentation (v0.8.x)

`SSLCertificate` Reference
==========================

The **`SSLCertificate`** class encapsulates an SSL certificate’s data and allows exporting it in various formats (PEM, DER, JSON, or text). It’s used within **Crawl4AI** whenever you set **`fetch_ssl_certificate=True`** in your **`CrawlerRunConfig`**.

1\. Overview
------------

**Location**: `crawl4ai/ssl_certificate.py`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-1) class SSLCertificate: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-2)     """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-3)     Represents an SSL certificate with methods to export in various formats. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-5)     Main Methods: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-6)     - from_url(url, timeout=10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-7)     - from_file(file_path) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-8)     - from_binary(binary_data) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-9)     - to_json(filepath=None) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-10)     - to_pem(filepath=None) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-11)     - to_der(filepath=None) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-12)     ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-14)     Common Properties: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-15)     - issuer [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-16)     - subject [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-17)     - valid_from [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-18)     - valid_until [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-19)     - fingerprint [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-0-20)     """`

### Typical Use Case

1.  You **enable** certificate fetching in your crawl by:
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-1-1) CrawlerRunConfig(fetch_ssl_certificate=True, ...)`
    
2.  After `arun()`, if `result.ssl_certificate` is present, it’s an instance of **`SSLCertificate`**.
3.  You can **read** basic properties (issuer, subject, validity) or **export** them in multiple formats.

* * *

2\. Construction & Fetching
---------------------------

### 2.1 **`from_url(url, timeout=10)`**

Manually load an SSL certificate from a given URL (port 443). Typically used internally, but you can call it directly if you want:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-2-1) cert = SSLCertificate.from_url("https://example.com") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-2-2) if cert: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-2-3)     print("Fingerprint:", cert.fingerprint)`

### 2.2 **`from_file(file_path)`**

Load from a file containing certificate data in ASN.1 or DER. Rarely needed unless you have local cert files:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-3-1) cert = SSLCertificate.from_file("/path/to/cert.der")`

### 2.3 **`from_binary(binary_data)`**

Initialize from raw binary. E.g., if you captured it from a socket or another source:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-4-1) cert = SSLCertificate.from_binary(raw_bytes)`

* * *

3\. Common Properties
---------------------

After obtaining a **`SSLCertificate`** instance (e.g. `result.ssl_certificate` from a crawl), you can read:

1. **`issuer`** _(dict)_  
\- E.g. `{"CN": "My Root CA", "O": "..."}` 2. **`subject`** _(dict)_  
\- E.g. `{"CN": "example.com", "O": "ExampleOrg"}` 3. **`valid_from`** _(str)_  
\- NotBefore date/time. Often in ASN.1/UTC format. 4. **`valid_until`** _(str)_  
\- NotAfter date/time. 5. **`fingerprint`** _(str)_  
\- The SHA-256 digest (lowercase hex).  
\- E.g. `"d14d2e..."`

* * *

4\. Export Methods
------------------

Once you have a **`SSLCertificate`** object, you can **export** or **inspect** it:

### 4.1 **`to_json(filepath=None)` → `Optional[str]`**

*   Returns a JSON string containing the parsed certificate fields.
*   If `filepath` is provided, saves it to disk instead, returning `None`.

**Usage**:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-5-1) json_data = cert.to_json()  # returns JSON string [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-5-2) cert.to_json("certificate.json")  # writes file, returns None`

### 4.2 **`to_pem(filepath=None)` → `Optional[str]`**

*   Returns a PEM-encoded string (common for web servers).
*   If `filepath` is provided, saves it to disk instead.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-6-1) pem_str = cert.to_pem()              # in-memory PEM string [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-6-2) cert.to_pem("/path/to/cert.pem")     # saved to file`

### 4.3 **`to_der(filepath=None)` → `Optional[bytes]`**

*   Returns the original DER (binary ASN.1) bytes.
*   If `filepath` is specified, writes the bytes there instead.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-7-1) der_bytes = cert.to_der() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-7-2) cert.to_der("certificate.der")`

### 4.4 (Optional) **`export_as_text()`**

*   If you see a method like `export_as_text()`, it typically returns an OpenSSL-style textual representation.
*   Not always needed, but can help for debugging or manual inspection.

* * *

5\. Example Usage in Crawl4AI
-----------------------------

Below is a minimal sample showing how the crawler obtains an SSL cert from a site, then reads or exports it. The code snippet:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-2) import os [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-3) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-5) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-6)     tmp_dir = "tmp" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-7)     os.makedirs(tmp_dir, exist_ok=True) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-9)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-10)         fetch_ssl_certificate=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-11)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-12)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-14)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-15)         result = await crawler.arun("https://example.com", config=config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-16)         if result.success and result.ssl_certificate: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-17)             cert = result.ssl_certificate [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-18)             # 1. Basic Info [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-19)             print("Issuer CN:", cert.issuer.get("CN", "")) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-20)             print("Valid until:", cert.valid_until) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-21)             print("Fingerprint:", cert.fingerprint) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-22) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-23)             # 2. Export [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-24)             cert.to_json(os.path.join(tmp_dir, "certificate.json")) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-25)             cert.to_pem(os.path.join(tmp_dir, "certificate.pem")) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-26)             cert.to_der(os.path.join(tmp_dir, "certificate.der")) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-27) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-28) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/ssl-certificate/#__codelineno-8-29)     asyncio.run(main())`

* * *

6\. Notes & Best Practices
--------------------------

1. **Timeout**: `SSLCertificate.from_url` internally uses a default **10s** socket connect and wraps SSL.  
2. **Binary Form**: The certificate is loaded in ASN.1 (DER) form, then re-parsed by `OpenSSL.crypto`.  
3. **Validation**: This does **not** validate the certificate chain or trust store. It only fetches and parses.  
4. **Integration**: Within Crawl4AI, you typically just set `fetch_ssl_certificate=True` in `CrawlerRunConfig`; the final result’s `ssl_certificate` is automatically built.  
5. **Export**: If you need to store or analyze a cert, the `to_json` and `to_pem` are quite universal.

* * *

### Summary

*   **`SSLCertificate`** is a convenience class for capturing and exporting the **TLS certificate** from your crawled site(s).
*   Common usage is in the **`CrawlResult.ssl_certificate`** field, accessible after setting `fetch_ssl_certificate=True`.
*   Offers quick access to essential certificate details (`issuer`, `subject`, `fingerprint`) and is easy to export (PEM, DER, JSON) for further analysis or server usage.

Use it whenever you need **insight** into a site’s certificate or require some form of cryptographic or compliance check.

* * *

\> Feedback

---

# arun_many() - Crawl4AI Documentation (v0.8.x)

`arun_many(...)` Reference
==========================

> **Note**: This function is very similar to [`arun()`](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun/)
>  but focused on **concurrent** or **batch** crawling. If you’re unfamiliar with `arun()` usage, please read that doc first, then review this for differences.

Function Signature
------------------

``[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-1) async def arun_many( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-2)     urls: Union[List[str], List[Any]], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-3)     config: Optional[Union[CrawlerRunConfig, List[CrawlerRunConfig]]] = None, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-4)     dispatcher: Optional[BaseDispatcher] = None, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-5)     ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-6) ) -> Union[List[CrawlResult], AsyncGenerator[CrawlResult, None]]: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-7)     """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-8)     Crawl multiple URLs concurrently or in batches. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-10)     :param urls: A list of URLs (or tasks) to crawl. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-11)     :param config: (Optional) Either: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-12)         - A single `CrawlerRunConfig` applying to all URLs [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-13)         - A list of `CrawlerRunConfig` objects with url_matcher patterns [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-14)     :param dispatcher: (Optional) A concurrency controller (e.g. MemoryAdaptiveDispatcher). [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-15)     ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-16)     :return: Either a list of `CrawlResult` objects, or an async generator if streaming is enabled. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-0-17)     """``

Differences from `arun()`
-------------------------

1. **Multiple URLs**:

*   Instead of crawling a single URL, you pass a list of them (strings or tasks). 
*   The function returns either a **list** of `CrawlResult` or an **async generator** if streaming is enabled.

2. **Concurrency & Dispatchers**:

*   **`dispatcher`** param allows advanced concurrency control. 
*   If omitted, a default dispatcher (like `MemoryAdaptiveDispatcher`) is used internally. 
*   Dispatchers handle concurrency, rate limiting, and memory-based adaptive throttling (see [Multi-URL Crawling](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/multi-url-crawling/)
    ).

3. **Streaming Support**:

*   Enable streaming by setting `stream=True` in your `CrawlerRunConfig`.
*   When streaming, use `async for` to process results as they become available.
*   Ideal for processing large numbers of URLs without waiting for all to complete.

4. **Parallel** Execution\*\*:

*   `arun_many()` can run multiple requests concurrently under the hood. 
*   Each `CrawlResult` might also include a **`dispatch_result`** with concurrency details (like memory usage, start/end times).

### Basic Example (Batch Mode)

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-1) # Minimal usage: The default dispatcher will be used [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-2) results = await crawler.arun_many( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-3)     urls=["https://site1.com", "https://site2.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-4)     config=CrawlerRunConfig(stream=False)  # Default behavior [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-5) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-7) for res in results: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-8)     if res.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-9)         print(res.url, "crawled OK!") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-10)     else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-1-11)         print("Failed:", res.url, "-", res.error_message)`

### Streaming Example

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-1) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-2)     stream=True,  # Enable streaming mode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-3)     cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-4) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-6) # Process results as they complete [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-7) async for result in await crawler.arun_many( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-8)     urls=["https://site1.com", "https://site2.com", "https://site3.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-9)     config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-10) ): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-11)     if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-12)         print(f"Just completed: {result.url}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-13)         # Process each result immediately [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-2-14)         process_result(result)`

### With a Custom Dispatcher

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-1) dispatcher = MemoryAdaptiveDispatcher( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-2)     memory_threshold_percent=70.0, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-3)     max_session_permit=10 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-4) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-5) results = await crawler.arun_many( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-6)     urls=["https://site1.com", "https://site2.com", "https://site3.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-7)     config=my_run_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-8)     dispatcher=dispatcher [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-3-9) )`

### URL-Specific Configurations

Instead of using one config for all URLs, provide a list of configs with `url_matcher` patterns:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-1) from crawl4ai import CrawlerRunConfig, MatchMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-2) from crawl4ai.processors.pdf import PDFContentScrapingStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-3) from crawl4ai.extraction_strategy import JsonCssExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-4) from crawl4ai.content_filter_strategy import PruningContentFilter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-5) from crawl4ai.markdown_generation_strategy import DefaultMarkdownGenerator [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-7) # PDF files - specialized extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-8) pdf_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-9)     url_matcher="*.pdf", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-10)     scraping_strategy=PDFContentScrapingStrategy() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-11) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-13) # Blog/article pages - content filtering [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-14) blog_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-15)     url_matcher=["*/blog/*", "*/article/*", "*python.org*"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-16)     markdown_generator=DefaultMarkdownGenerator( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-17)         content_filter=PruningContentFilter(threshold=0.48) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-18)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-19) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-20) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-21) # Dynamic pages - JavaScript execution [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-22) github_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-23)     url_matcher=lambda url: 'github.com' in url, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-24)     js_code="window.scrollTo(0, 500);" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-25) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-26) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-27) # API endpoints - JSON extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-28) api_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-29)     url_matcher=lambda url: 'api' in url or url.endswith('.json'), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-30)     # Custome settings for JSON extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-31) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-32) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-33) # Default fallback config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-34) default_config = CrawlerRunConfig()  # No url_matcher means it never matches except as fallback [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-35) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-36) # Pass the list of configs - first match wins! [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-37) results = await crawler.arun_many( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-38)     urls=[ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-39)         "https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf",  # → pdf_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-40)         "https://blog.python.org/",  # → blog_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-41)         "https://github.com/microsoft/playwright",  # → github_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-42)         "https://httpbin.org/json",  # → api_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-43)         "https://example.com/"  # → default_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-44)     ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-45)     config=[pdf_config, blog_config, github_config, api_config, default_config] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/arun_many/#__codelineno-4-46) )`

**URL Matching Features**: - **String patterns**: `"*.pdf"`, `"*/blog/*"`, `"*python.org*"` - **Function matchers**: `lambda url: 'api' in url` - **Mixed patterns**: Combine strings and functions with `MatchMode.OR` or `MatchMode.AND` - **First match wins**: Configs are evaluated in order

**Key Points**: - Each URL is processed by the same or separate sessions, depending on the dispatcher’s strategy. - `dispatch_result` in each `CrawlResult` (if using concurrency) can hold memory and timing info.  - If you need to handle authentication or session IDs, pass them in each individual task or within your run config. - **Important**: Always include a default config (without `url_matcher`) as the last item if you want to handle all URLs. Otherwise, unmatched URLs will fail.

### Return Value

Either a **list** of [`CrawlResult`](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/crawl-result/)
 objects, or an **async generator** if streaming is enabled. You can iterate to check `result.success` or read each item’s `extracted_content`, `markdown`, or `dispatch_result`.

* * *

Dispatcher Reference
--------------------

*   **`MemoryAdaptiveDispatcher`**: Dynamically manages concurrency based on system memory usage. 
*   **`SemaphoreDispatcher`**: Fixed concurrency limit, simpler but less adaptive. 

For advanced usage or custom settings, see [Multi-URL Crawling with Dispatchers](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/multi-url-crawling/)
.

* * *

Common Pitfalls
---------------

1. **Large Lists**: If you pass thousands of URLs, be mindful of memory or rate-limits. A dispatcher can help. 

2. **Session Reuse**: If you need specialized logins or persistent contexts, ensure your dispatcher or tasks handle sessions accordingly. 

3. **Error Handling**: Each `CrawlResult` might fail for different reasons—always check `result.success` or the `error_message` before proceeding.

* * *

Conclusion
----------

Use `arun_many()` when you want to **crawl multiple URLs** simultaneously or in controlled parallel tasks. If you need advanced concurrency features (like memory-based adaptive throttling or complex rate-limiting), provide a **dispatcher**. Each result is a standard `CrawlResult`, possibly augmented with concurrency stats (`dispatch_result`) for deeper inspection. For more details on concurrency logic and dispatchers, see the [Advanced Multi-URL Crawling](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/multi-url-crawling/)
 docs.

* * *

\> Feedback

---

# Undetected Browser - Crawl4AI Documentation (v0.8.x)

Undetected Browser Mode
=======================

Overview
--------

Crawl4AI offers two powerful anti-bot features to help you access websites with bot detection:

1.  **Stealth Mode** - Uses playwright-stealth to modify browser fingerprints and behaviors
2.  **Undetected Browser Mode** - Advanced browser adapter with deep-level patches for sophisticated bot detection

This guide covers both features and helps you choose the right approach for your needs.

Anti-Bot Features Comparison
----------------------------

| Feature | Regular Browser | Stealth Mode | Undetected Browser |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WebDriver Detection | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   |
| Navigator Properties | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   |
| Plugin Emulation | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   |
| CDP Detection | ❌   | Partial | ✅   |
| Deep Browser Patches | ❌   | ❌   | ✅   |
| Performance Impact | None | Minimal | Moderate |
| Setup Complexity | None | None | Minimal |

When to Use Each Approach
-------------------------

### Use Regular Browser + Stealth Mode When:

*   Sites have basic bot detection (checking navigator.webdriver, plugins, etc.)
*   You need good performance with basic protection
*   Sites check for common automation indicators

### Use Undetected Browser When:

*   Sites employ sophisticated bot detection services (Cloudflare, DataDome, etc.)
*   Stealth mode alone isn't sufficient
*   You're willing to trade some performance for better evasion

### Best Practice: Progressive Enhancement

1.  **Start with**: Regular browser + Stealth mode
2.  **If blocked**: Switch to Undetected browser
3.  **If still blocked**: Combine Undetected browser + Stealth mode

Stealth Mode
------------

Stealth mode is the simpler anti-bot solution that works with both regular and undetected browsers:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-1) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-3) # Enable stealth mode with regular browser [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-4) browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-5)     enable_stealth=True,  # Simple flag to enable [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-6)     headless=False       # Better for avoiding detection [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-7) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-9) async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_config) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-0-10)     result = await crawler.arun("https://example.com")`

### What Stealth Mode Does:

*   Removes `navigator.webdriver` flag
*   Modifies browser fingerprints
*   Emulates realistic plugin behavior
*   Adjusts navigator properties
*   Fixes common automation leaks

Undetected Browser Mode
-----------------------

For sites with sophisticated bot detection that stealth mode can't bypass, use the undetected browser adapter:

### Key Features

*   **Drop-in Replacement**: Uses the same API as regular browser mode
*   **Enhanced Stealth**: Built-in patches to evade common detection methods
*   **Browser Adapter Pattern**: Seamlessly switch between regular and undetected modes
*   **Automatic Installation**: `crawl4ai-setup` installs all necessary browser dependencies

### Quick Start

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-2) from crawl4ai import ( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-3)     AsyncWebCrawler,  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-4)     BrowserConfig,  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-5)     CrawlerRunConfig, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-6)     UndetectedAdapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-7) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-8) from crawl4ai.async_crawler_strategy import AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-10) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-11)     # Create the undetected adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-12)     undetected_adapter = UndetectedAdapter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-14)     # Create browser config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-15)     browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-16)         headless=False,  # Headless mode can be detected easier [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-17)         verbose=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-18)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-19) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-20)     # Create the crawler strategy with undetected adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-21)     crawler_strategy = AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-22)         browser_config=browser_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-23)         browser_adapter=undetected_adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-24)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-26)     # Create the crawler with our custom strategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-27)     async with AsyncWebCrawler( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-28)         crawler_strategy=crawler_strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-29)         config=browser_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-30)     ) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-31)         # Your crawling code here [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-32)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-33)             url="https://example.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-34)             config=CrawlerRunConfig() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-35)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-36)         print(result.markdown[:500]) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-37) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-1-38) asyncio.run(main())`

Combining Both Features
-----------------------

For maximum evasion, combine stealth mode with undetected browser:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-1) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, UndetectedAdapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-2) from crawl4ai.async_crawler_strategy import AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-4) # Create browser config with stealth enabled [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-5) browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-6)     enable_stealth=True,  # Enable stealth mode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-7)     headless=False [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-8) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-10) # Create undetected adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-11) adapter = UndetectedAdapter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-13) # Create strategy with both features [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-14) strategy = AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-15)     browser_config=browser_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-16)     browser_adapter=adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-17) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-19) async with AsyncWebCrawler( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-20)     crawler_strategy=strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-21)     config=browser_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-22) ) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-2-23)     result = await crawler.arun("https://protected-site.com")`

Examples
--------

### Example 1: Basic Stealth Mode

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-4) async def test_stealth_mode(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-5)     # Simple stealth mode configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-6)     browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-7)         enable_stealth=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-8)         headless=False [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-9)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-11)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_config) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-12)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-13)             url="https://bot.sannysoft.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-14)             config=CrawlerRunConfig(screenshot=True) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-15)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-16) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-17)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-18)             print("✓ Successfully accessed bot detection test site") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-19)             # Save screenshot to verify detection results [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-20)             if result.screenshot: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-21)                 import base64 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-22)                 with open("stealth_test.png", "wb") as f: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-23)                     f.write(base64.b64decode(result.screenshot)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-24)                 print("✓ Screenshot saved - check for green (passed) tests") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-3-26) asyncio.run(test_stealth_mode())`

### Example 2: Undetected Browser Mode

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-2) from crawl4ai import ( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-3)     AsyncWebCrawler, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-4)     BrowserConfig, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-5)     CrawlerRunConfig, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-6)     UndetectedAdapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-7) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-8) from crawl4ai.async_crawler_strategy import AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-11) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-12)     # Create browser config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-13)     browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-14)         headless=False, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-15)         verbose=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-16)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-17) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-18)     # Create the undetected adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-19)     undetected_adapter = UndetectedAdapter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-20) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-21)     # Create the crawler strategy with the undetected adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-22)     crawler_strategy = AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-23)         browser_config=browser_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-24)         browser_adapter=undetected_adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-25)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-26) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-27)     # Create the crawler with our custom strategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-28)     async with AsyncWebCrawler( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-29)         crawler_strategy=crawler_strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-30)         config=browser_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-31)     ) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-32)         # Configure the crawl [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-33)         crawler_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-34)             markdown_generator=DefaultMarkdownGenerator( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-35)                 content_filter=PruningContentFilter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-36)             ), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-37)             capture_console_messages=True,  # Test adapter console capture [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-38)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-39) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-40)         # Test on a site that typically detects bots [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-41)         print("Testing undetected adapter...") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-42)         result: CrawlResult = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-43)             url="https://www.helloworld.org",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-44)             config=crawler_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-45)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-46) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-47)         print(f"Status: {result.status_code}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-48)         print(f"Success: {result.success}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-49)         print(f"Console messages captured: {len(result.console_messages or [])}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-50)         print(f"Markdown content (first 500 chars):\n{result.markdown.raw_markdown[:500]}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-51) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-52) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-53) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-4-54)     asyncio.run(main())`

Browser Adapter Pattern
-----------------------

The undetected browser support is implemented using an adapter pattern, allowing seamless switching between different browser implementations:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-1) # Regular browser adapter (default) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-2) from crawl4ai import PlaywrightAdapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-3) regular_adapter = PlaywrightAdapter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-5) # Undetected browser adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-6) from crawl4ai import UndetectedAdapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-5-7) undetected_adapter = UndetectedAdapter()`

The adapter handles: - JavaScript execution - Console message capture - Error handling - Browser-specific optimizations

Best Practices
--------------

1.  **Avoid Headless Mode**: Detection is easier in headless mode
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-6-1) browser_config = BrowserConfig(headless=False)`
    
2.  **Use Reasonable Delays**: Don't rush through pages
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-7-1) crawler_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-7-2)     wait_time=3.0,  # Wait 3 seconds after page load [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-7-3)     delay_before_return_html=2.0  # Additional delay [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-7-4) )`
    
3.  **Rotate User Agents**: You can customize user agents
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-8-1) browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-8-2)     headers={"User-Agent": "your-user-agent"} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-8-3) )`
    
4.  **Handle Failures Gracefully**: Some sites may still detect and block
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-9-1) if not result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-9-2)     print(f"Crawl failed: {result.error_message}")`
    

Advanced Usage Tips
-------------------

### Progressive Detection Handling

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-1) async def crawl_with_progressive_evasion(url): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-2)     # Step 1: Try regular browser with stealth [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-3)     browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-4)         enable_stealth=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-5)         headless=False [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-6)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-7) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-8)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_config) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-9)         result = await crawler.arun(url) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-10)         if result.success and "Access Denied" not in result.html: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-11)             return result [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-13)     # Step 2: If blocked, try undetected browser [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-14)     print("Regular + stealth blocked, trying undetected browser...") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-16)     adapter = UndetectedAdapter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-17)     strategy = AsyncPlaywrightCrawlerStrategy( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-18)         browser_config=browser_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-19)         browser_adapter=adapter [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-20)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-21) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-22)     async with AsyncWebCrawler( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-23)         crawler_strategy=strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-24)         config=browser_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-25)     ) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-26)         result = await crawler.arun(url) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-10-27)         return result`

Installation
------------

The undetected browser dependencies are automatically installed when you run:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-11-1) crawl4ai-setup`

This command installs all necessary browser dependencies for both regular and undetected modes.

Limitations
-----------

*   **Performance**: Slightly slower than regular mode due to additional patches
*   **Headless Detection**: Some sites can still detect headless mode
*   **Resource Usage**: May use more resources than regular mode
*   **Not 100% Guaranteed**: Advanced anti-bot services are constantly evolving

Troubleshooting
---------------

### Browser Not Found

Run the setup command:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-12-1) crawl4ai-setup`

### Detection Still Occurring

Try combining with other features:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-13-1) crawler_config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-13-2)     simulate_user=True,  # Add user simulation [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-13-3)     magic=True,  # Enable magic mode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-13-4)     wait_time=5.0,  # Longer waits [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-13-5) )`

### Performance Issues

If experiencing slow performance:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-14-1) # Use selective undetected mode only for protected sites [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-14-2) if is_protected_site(url): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-14-3)     adapter = UndetectedAdapter() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-14-4) else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/undetected-browser/#__codelineno-14-5)     adapter = PlaywrightAdapter()  # Default adapter`

Future Plans
------------

**Note**: In future versions of Crawl4AI, we may enable stealth mode and undetected browser by default to provide better out-of-the-box success rates. For now, users should explicitly enable these features when needed.

Conclusion
----------

Crawl4AI provides flexible anti-bot solutions:

1.  **Start Simple**: Use regular browser + stealth mode for most sites
2.  **Escalate if Needed**: Switch to undetected browser for sophisticated protection
3.  **Combine for Maximum Effect**: Use both features together when facing the toughest challenges

Remember: - Always respect robots.txt and website terms of service - Use appropriate delays to avoid overwhelming servers - Consider the performance trade-offs of each approach - Test progressively to find the minimum necessary evasion level

See Also
--------

*   [Advanced Features](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/advanced-features/)
     - Overview of all advanced features
*   [Proxy & Security](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/proxy-security/)
     - Using proxies with anti-bot features
*   [Session Management](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/)
     - Maintaining sessions across requests
*   [Identity Based Crawling](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/identity-based-crawling/)
     - Additional anti-detection strategies
*   [Anti-Bot Detection & Fallback](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/anti-bot-and-fallback/)
     - Automatic retry and proxy escalation when blocking is detected

* * *

\> Feedback

# Session Management - Crawl4AI Documentation (v0.8.x)

Session Management
==================

Session management in Crawl4AI is a powerful feature that allows you to maintain state across multiple requests, making it particularly suitable for handling complex multi-step crawling tasks. It enables you to reuse the same browser tab (or page object) across sequential actions and crawls, which is beneficial for:

*   **Performing JavaScript actions before and after crawling.**
*   **Executing multiple sequential crawls faster** without needing to reopen tabs or allocate memory repeatedly.

**Note:** This feature is designed for sequential workflows and is not suitable for parallel operations.

* * *

#### Basic Session Usage

Use `BrowserConfig` and `CrawlerRunConfig` to maintain state with a `session_id`:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-1) from crawl4ai.async_configs import BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-3) async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-4)     session_id = "my_session" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-6)     # Define configurations [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-7)     config1 = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-8)         url="https://example.com/page1", session_id=session_id [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-9)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-10)     config2 = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-11)         url="https://example.com/page2", session_id=session_id [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-12)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-14)     # First request [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-15)     result1 = await crawler.arun(config=config1) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-16) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-17)     # Subsequent request using the same session [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-18)     result2 = await crawler.arun(config=config2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-19) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-20)     # Clean up when done [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-0-21)     await crawler.crawler_strategy.kill_session(session_id)`

* * *

#### Dynamic Content with Sessions

Here's an example of crawling GitHub commits across multiple pages while preserving session state:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-1) from crawl4ai.async_configs import CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-2) from crawl4ai import JsonCssExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-3) from crawl4ai.cache_context import CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-5) async def crawl_dynamic_content(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-6)     url = "https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/commits/main" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-7)     session_id = "wait_for_session" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-8)     all_commits = [] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-10)     js_next_page = """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-11)     const commits = document.querySelectorAll('li[data-testid="commit-row-item"] h4'); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-12)     if (commits.length > 0) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-13)         window.lastCommit = commits[0].textContent.trim(); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-14)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-15)     const button = document.querySelector('a[data-testid="pagination-next-button"]'); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-16)     if (button) {button.click(); console.log('button clicked') } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-17)     """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-19)     wait_for = """() => { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-20)         const commits = document.querySelectorAll('li[data-testid="commit-row-item"] h4'); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-21)         if (commits.length === 0) return false; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-22)         const firstCommit = commits[0].textContent.trim(); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-23)         return firstCommit !== window.lastCommit; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-24)     }""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-26)     schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-27)         "name": "Commit Extractor", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-28)         "baseSelector": "li[data-testid='commit-row-item']", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-29)         "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-30)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-31)                 "name": "title", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-32)                 "selector": "h4 a", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-33)                 "type": "text",    }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-36)         ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-37)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-38)     extraction_strategy = JsonCssExtractionStrategy(schema, verbose=True) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-39) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-40) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-41)     browser_config = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-42)         verbose=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-43)         headless=False, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-44)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-45) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-46)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_config) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-47)         for page in range(3):                 session_id=session_id, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-50)                 css_selector="li[data-testid='commit-row-item']", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-51)                 extraction_strategy=extraction_strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-57)             ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-58) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-60) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-61)             if result.console_messages: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-62)                 print(f"Page {page + 1} console messages:", result.console_messages) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-63) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-64)             if result.extracted_content: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-65)                 # print(f"Page {page + 1} result:", result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-66)                 commits = json.loads(result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-67)                 all_commits.extend(commits) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-68)                 print(f"Page {page + 1}: Found {len(commits)} commits") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-69)             else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-70)                 print(f"Page {page + 1}: No content extracted") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-71) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-72)         print(f"Successfully crawled {len(all_commits)} commits across 3 pages") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-73)         # Clean up session [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-1-74)         await crawler.crawler_strategy.kill_session(session_id)`

* * *

Example 1: Basic Session-Based Crawling
---------------------------------------

A simple example using session-based crawling:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-2) from crawl4ai.async_configs import BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-3) from crawl4ai.cache_context import CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-5) async def basic_session_crawl(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-6)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-7)         session_id = "dynamic_content_session" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-8)         url = "https://example.com/dynamic-content" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/advanced/session-management/#__codelineno-2-10)         for page in range(3):
