Add custom headers for testing [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-23)     await page.set_extra_http_headers({ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-24)         "X-Test-Header": "crawl4ai-test", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-25)         "Accept-Language": "en-US,en;q=0.9" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-26)     }) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-27)     print(f"[HOOK] Navigating to: {url}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-28)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-29) """, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-30) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-31)     "before_retrieve_html": """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-32) async def hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-33)     # Simple scroll for any lazy-loaded content [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-34)     await page.evaluate("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-35)     await page.wait_for_timeout(1000) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-36)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-37) """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-38) } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-39) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-40) # Make the request to safe testing endpoints [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-41) response = requests.post("http://localhost:11235/crawl", json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-42)     "urls": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-43)         "https://httpbin.org/html", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-44)         "https://httpbin.org/json" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-45)     ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-46)     "hooks": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-47)         "code": hooks_code, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-48)         "timeout": 30 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-49)     }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-50)     "crawler_config": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-51)         "cache_mode": "bypass" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-52)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-53) }) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-54) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-55) # Check results [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-56) if response.status_code == 200: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-57)     data = response.json() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-58) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-59)     # Check hook execution [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-60)     if data['hooks']['status']['status'] == 'success': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-61)         print(f"✅ All {len(data['hooks']['status']['attached_hooks'])} hooks executed successfully") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-62)         print(f"Execution stats: {data['hooks']['summary']}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-63) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-64)     # Process crawl results [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-65)     for result in data['results']: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-66)         print(f"Crawled: {result['url']} - Success: {result['success']}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-67) else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-38-68)     print(f"Error: {response.status_code}")`

> 💡 **Remember**: Always test your hooks on safe, known websites first before using them on production sites. Never crawl sites that you don't have permission to access or that might be malicious.

### Hooks Utility: Function-Based Approach (Python)

For Python developers, Crawl4AI provides a more convenient way to work with hooks using the `hooks_to_string()` utility function and Docker client integration.

#### Why Use Function-Based Hooks?

**String-Based Approach (shown above)**:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-1) hooks_code = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-2)     "on_page_context_created": """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-3) async def hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-4)     await page.set_viewport_size({"width": 1920, "height": 1080}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-5)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-6) """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-39-7) }`

**Function-Based Approach (recommended for Python)**:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-1) from crawl4ai import Crawl4aiDockerClient [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-3) async def my_hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-4)     await page.set_viewport_size({"width": 1920, "height": 1080}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-5)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-7) async with Crawl4aiDockerClient(base_url="http://localhost:11235") as client: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-8)     result = await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-9)         ["https://example.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-10)         hooks={"on_page_context_created": my_hook} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-40-11)     )`

**Benefits**: - ✅ Write hooks as regular Python functions - ✅ Full IDE support (autocomplete, syntax highlighting, type checking) - ✅ Easy to test and debug - ✅ Reusable hook libraries - ✅ Automatic conversion to API format

#### Using the Hooks Utility

The `hooks_to_string()` utility converts Python function objects to the string format required by the API:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-1) from crawl4ai import hooks_to_string [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-3) # Define your hooks as functions [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-4) async def setup_hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-5)     await page.set_viewport_size({"width": 1920, "height": 1080}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-6)     await context.add_cookies([{ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-7)         "name": "session", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-8)         "value": "token", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-9)         "domain": ".example.com" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-10)     }]) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-11)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-13) async def scroll_hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-14)     await page.evaluate("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-15)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-16) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-17) # Convert to string format [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-18) hooks_dict = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-19)     "on_page_context_created": setup_hook, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-20)     "before_retrieve_html": scroll_hook [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-21) } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-22) hooks_string = hooks_to_string(hooks_dict) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-24) # Now use with REST API or Docker client [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-41-25) # hooks_string contains the string representations`

#### Docker Client with Automatic Conversion

The Docker client automatically detects and converts function objects:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-1) from crawl4ai import Crawl4aiDockerClient [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-3) async def auth_hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-4)     """Add authentication cookies""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-5)     await context.add_cookies([{ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-6)         "name": "auth_token", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-7)         "value": "your_token", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-8)         "domain": ".example.com" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-9)     }]) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-10)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-12) async def performance_hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-13)     """Block unnecessary resources""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-14)     await context.route("**/*.{png,jpg,gif}", lambda r: r.abort()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-15)     await context.route("**/analytics/*", lambda r: r.abort()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-16)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-17) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-18) async with Crawl4aiDockerClient(base_url="http://localhost:11235") as client: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-19)     # Pass functions directly - automatic conversion! [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-20)     result = await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-21)         ["https://example.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-22)         hooks={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-23)             "on_page_context_created": performance_hook, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-24)             "before_goto": auth_hook [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-25)         }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-26)         hooks_timeout=30  # Optional timeout in seconds (1-120) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-27)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-28) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-29)     print(f"Success: {result.success}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-42-30)     print(f"HTML: {len(result.html)} chars")`

#### Creating Reusable Hook Libraries

Build collections of reusable hooks:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-1) # hooks_library.py [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-2) class CrawlHooks: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-3)     """Reusable hook collection for common crawling tasks""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-5)     @staticmethod [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-6)     async def block_images(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-7)         """Block all images to speed up crawling""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-8)         await context.route("**/*.{png,jpg,jpeg,gif,webp}", lambda r: r.abort()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-9)         return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-11)     @staticmethod [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-12)     async def block_analytics(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-13)         """Block analytics and tracking scripts""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-14)         tracking_domains = [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-15)             "**/google-analytics.com/*", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-16)             "**/googletagmanager.com/*", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-17)             "**/facebook.com/tr/*", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-18)             "**/doubleclick.net/*" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-19)         ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-20)         for domain in tracking_domains: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-21)             await context.route(domain, lambda r: r.abort()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-22)         return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-24)     @staticmethod [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-25)     async def scroll_infinite(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-26)         """Handle infinite scroll to load more content""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-27)         previous_height = 0 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-28)         for i in range(5):  # Max 5 scrolls [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-29)             current_height = await page.evaluate("document.body.scrollHeight") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-30)             if current_height == previous_height: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-31)                 break [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-32)             await page.evaluate("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-33)             await page.wait_for_timeout(1000) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-34)             previous_height = current_height [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-35)         return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-36) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-37)     @staticmethod [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-38)     async def wait_for_dynamic_content(page, context, url, response, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-39)         """Wait for dynamic content to load""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-40)         await page.wait_for_timeout(2000) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-41)         try: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-42)             # Click "Load More" if present [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-43)             load_more = await page.query_selector('[class*="load-more"]') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-44)             if load_more: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-45)                 await load_more.click() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-46)                 await page.wait_for_timeout(1000) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-47)         except: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-48)             pass [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-49)         return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-50) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-51) # Use in your application [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-52) from hooks_library import CrawlHooks [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-53) from crawl4ai import Crawl4aiDockerClient [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-54) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-55) async def crawl_with_optimizations(url): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-56)     async with Crawl4aiDockerClient() as client: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-57)         result = await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-58)             [url], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-59)             hooks={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-60)                 "on_page_context_created": CrawlHooks.block_images, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-61)                 "before_retrieve_html": CrawlHooks.scroll_infinite [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-62)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-63)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-43-64)         return result`

#### Choosing the Right Approach

| Approach | Best For | IDE Support | Language |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **String-based** | Non-Python clients, REST APIs, other languages | ❌ None | Any |
| **Function-based** | Python applications, local development | ✅ Full | Python only |
| **Docker Client** | Python apps with automatic conversion | ✅ Full | Python only |

**Recommendation**: - **Python applications**: Use Docker client with function objects (easiest) - **Non-Python or REST API**: Use string-based hooks (most flexible) - **Manual control**: Use `hooks_to_string()` utility (middle ground)

#### Complete Example with Function Hooks

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-1) from crawl4ai import Crawl4aiDockerClient, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-3) # Define hooks as regular Python functions [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-4) async def setup_environment(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-5)     """Setup crawling environment""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-6)     # Set viewport [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-7)     await page.set_viewport_size({"width": 1920, "height": 1080}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-9)     # Block resources for speed [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-10)     await context.route("**/*.{png,jpg,gif}", lambda r: r.abort()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-12)     # Add custom headers [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-13)     await page.set_extra_http_headers({ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-14)         "Accept-Language": "en-US", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-15)         "X-Custom-Header": "Crawl4AI" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-16)     }) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-17) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-18)     print("[HOOK] Environment configured") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-19)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-20) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-21) async def extract_content(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-22)     """Extract and prepare content""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-23)     # Scroll to load lazy content [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-24)     await page.evaluate("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-25)     await page.wait_for_timeout(1000) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-26) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-27)     # Extract metadata [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-28)     metadata = await page.evaluate('''() => ({ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-29)         title: document.title, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-30)         links: document.links.length, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-31)         images: document.images.length [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-32)     })''') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-33) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-34)     print(f"[HOOK] Page metadata: {metadata}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-35)     return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-36) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-37) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-38)     async with Crawl4aiDockerClient(base_url="http://localhost:11235", verbose=True) as client: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-39)         # Configure crawl [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-40)         browser_config = BrowserConfig(headless=True) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-41)         crawler_config = CrawlerRunConfig(cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-42) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-43)         # Crawl with hooks [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-44)         result = await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-45)             ["https://httpbin.org/html"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-46)             browser_config=browser_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-47)             crawler_config=crawler_config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-48)             hooks={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-49)                 "on_page_context_created": setup_environment, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-50)                 "before_retrieve_html": extract_content [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-51)             }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-52)             hooks_timeout=30 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-53)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-54) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-55)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-56)             print(f"✅ Crawl successful!") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-57)             print(f"   URL: {result.url}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-58)             print(f"   HTML: {len(result.html)} chars") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-59)             print(f"   Markdown: {len(result.markdown)} chars") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-60)         else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-61)             print(f"❌ Crawl failed: {result.error_message}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-62) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-63) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-64)     import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-44-65)     asyncio.run(main())`

#### Additional Resources

*   **Comprehensive Examples**: See `/docs/examples/hooks_docker_client_example.py` for Python function-based examples
*   **REST API Examples**: See `/docs/examples/hooks_rest_api_example.py` for string-based examples

* * *

Job Queue & Webhook API
-----------------------

The Docker deployment includes a powerful asynchronous job queue system with webhook support for both crawling and LLM extraction tasks. Instead of waiting for long-running operations to complete, submit jobs and receive real-time notifications via webhooks when they finish.

### Why Use the Job Queue API?

**Traditional Synchronous API (`/crawl`):** - Client waits for entire crawl to complete - Timeout issues with long-running crawls - Resource blocking during execution - Constant polling required for status updates

**Asynchronous Job Queue API (`/crawl/job`, `/llm/job`):** - ✅ Submit job and continue immediately - ✅ No timeout concerns for long operations - ✅ Real-time webhook notifications on completion - ✅ Better resource utilization - ✅ Perfect for batch processing - ✅ Ideal for microservice architectures

### Available Endpoints

#### 1\. Crawl Job Endpoint

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-45-1) POST /crawl/job`

Submit an asynchronous crawl job with optional webhook notification.

**Request Body:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-2)   "urls": ["https://example.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-3)   "cache_mode": "bypass", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-4)   "extraction_strategy": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-5)     "type": "JsonCssExtractionStrategy", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-6)     "schema": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-7)       "title": "h1", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-8)       "content": ".article-body" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-9)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-10)   }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-11)   "webhook_config": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-12)     "webhook_url": "https://your-app.com/webhook/crawl-complete", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-13)     "webhook_data_in_payload": true, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-14)     "webhook_headers": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-15)       "X-Webhook-Secret": "your-secret-token", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-16)       "X-Custom-Header": "value" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-17)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-18)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-46-19) }`

**Response:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-47-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-47-2)   "task_id": "crawl_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-47-3)   "message": "Crawl job submitted" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-47-4) }`

#### 2\. LLM Extraction Job Endpoint

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-48-1) POST /llm/job`

Submit an asynchronous LLM extraction job with optional webhook notification.

**Request Body:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-2)   "url": "https://example.com/article", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-3)   "q": "Extract the article title, author, publication date, and main points", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-4)   "provider": "openai/gpt-4o-mini", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-5)   "schema": "{\"title\": \"string\", \"author\": \"string\", \"date\": \"string\", \"points\": [\"string\"]}", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-6)   "cache": false, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-7)   "webhook_config": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-8)     "webhook_url": "https://your-app.com/webhook/llm-complete", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-9)     "webhook_data_in_payload": true, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-10)     "webhook_headers": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-11)       "X-Webhook-Secret": "your-secret-token" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-12)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-13)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-49-14) }`

**Response:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-50-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-50-2)   "task_id": "llm_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-50-3)   "message": "LLM job submitted" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-50-4) }`

#### 3\. Job Status Endpoint

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-51-1) GET /job/{task_id}`

Check the status and retrieve results of a submitted job.

**Response (In Progress):**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-52-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-52-2)   "task_id": "crawl_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-52-3)   "status": "processing", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-52-4)   "message": "Job is being processed" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-52-5) }`

**Response (Completed):**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-2)   "task_id": "crawl_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-3)   "status": "completed", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-4)   "result": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-5)     "markdown": "# Page Title\n\nContent...", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-6)     "extracted_content": {...}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-7)     "links": {...} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-8)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-53-9) }`

### Webhook Configuration

Webhooks provide real-time notifications when your jobs complete, eliminating the need for constant polling.

#### Webhook Config Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `webhook_url` | string | Yes | Your HTTP(S) endpoint to receive notifications |
| `webhook_data_in_payload` | boolean | No  | Include full result data in webhook payload (default: false) |
| `webhook_headers` | object | No  | Custom headers for authentication/identification |

#### Webhook Payload Format

**Success Notification (Crawl Job):**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-2)   "task_id": "crawl_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-3)   "task_type": "crawl", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-4)   "status": "completed", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-5)   "timestamp": "2025-10-22T12:30:00.000000+00:00", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-6)   "urls": ["https://example.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-7)   "data": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-8)     "markdown": "# Page content...", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-9)     "extracted_content": {...}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-10)     "links": {...} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-11)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-54-12) }`

**Success Notification (LLM Job):**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-2)   "task_id": "llm_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-3)   "task_type": "llm_extraction", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-4)   "status": "completed", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-5)   "timestamp": "2025-10-22T12:30:00.000000+00:00", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-6)   "urls": ["https://example.com/article"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-7)   "data": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-8)     "extracted_content": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-9)       "title": "Understanding Web Scraping", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-10)       "author": "John Doe", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-11)       "date": "2025-10-22", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-12)       "points": ["Point 1", "Point 2"] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-13)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-14)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-55-15) }`

**Failure Notification:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-2)   "task_id": "crawl_1698765432", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-3)   "task_type": "crawl", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-4)   "status": "failed", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-5)   "timestamp": "2025-10-22T12:30:00.000000+00:00", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-6)   "urls": ["https://example.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-7)   "error": "Connection timeout after 30 seconds" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-56-8) }`

#### Webhook Delivery & Retry

*   **Delivery Method:** HTTP POST to your `webhook_url`
*   **Content-Type:** `application/json`
*   **Retry Policy:** Exponential backoff with 5 attempts
*   Attempt 1: Immediate
*   Attempt 2: 1 second delay
*   Attempt 3: 2 seconds delay
*   Attempt 4: 4 seconds delay
*   Attempt 5: 8 seconds delay
*   **Success Status Codes:** 200-299
*   **Custom Headers:** Your `webhook_headers` are included in every request

### Usage Examples

#### Example 1: Python with Webhook Handler (Flask)

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-1) from flask import Flask, request, jsonify [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-2) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-4) app = Flask(__name__) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-6) # Webhook handler [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-7) @app.route('/webhook/crawl-complete', methods=['POST']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-8) def handle_crawl_webhook(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-9)     payload = request.json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-11)     if payload['status'] == 'completed': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-12)         print(f"✅ Job {payload['task_id']} completed!") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-13)         print(f"Task type: {payload['task_type']}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-14) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-15)         # Access the crawl results [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-16)         if 'data' in payload: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-17)             markdown = payload['data'].get('markdown', '') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-18)             extracted = payload['data'].get('extracted_content', {}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-19)             print(f"Extracted {len(markdown)} characters") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-20)             print(f"Structured data: {extracted}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-21)     else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-22)         print(f"❌ Job {payload['task_id']} failed: {payload.get('error')}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-24)     return jsonify({"status": "received"}), 200 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-26) # Submit a crawl job with webhook [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-27) def submit_crawl_job(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-28)     response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-29)         "http://localhost:11235/crawl/job", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-30)         json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-42)             }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-57-43)             "webhook_config": { #### Example 2: LLM Extraction with Webhooks

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-1) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-3) def submit_llm_job_with_webhook(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-4)     response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-5)         "http://localhost:11235/llm/job", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-6)         json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-7)             "url": "https://example.com/article", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-8)             "q": "Extract the article title, author, and main points", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-9)             "provider": "openai/gpt-4o-mini", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-10)             "webhook_config": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-11)                 "webhook_url": "https://your-app.com/webhook/llm-complete", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-12)                 "webhook_data_in_payload": True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-13)                 "webhook_headers": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-14)                     "X-Webhook-Secret": "your-secret-token" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-15)                 } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-16)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-17)         } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-18)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-19) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-20)     task_id = response.json()['task_id'] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-21)     print(f"LLM job submitted: {task_id}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-22)     return task_id [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-24) # Webhook handler for LLM jobs [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-25) @app.route('/webhook/llm-complete', methods=['POST']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-26) def handle_llm_webhook(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-27)     payload = request.json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-28) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-29)     if payload['status'] == 'completed': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-30)         extracted = payload['data']['extracted_content'] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-31)         print(f"✅ LLM extraction completed!") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-32)         print(f"Results: {extracted}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-33)     else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-34)         print(f"❌ LLM extraction failed: {payload.get('error')}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-35) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-58-36)     return jsonify({"status": "received"}), 200`

#### Example 3: Without Webhooks (Polling)

If you don't use webhooks, you can poll for results:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-1) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-2) import time [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-4) # Submit job [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-5) response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-6)     "http://localhost:11235/crawl/job", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-7)     json={"urls": ["https://example.com"]} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-8) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-9) task_id = response.json()['task_id'] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-11) # Poll for results [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-12) while True: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-13)     result = requests.get(f"http://localhost:11235/job/{task_id}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-14)     data = result.json() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-16)     if data['status'] == 'completed': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-17)         print("Job completed!") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-18)         print(data['result']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-19)         break [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-20)     elif data['status'] == 'failed': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-21)         print(f"Job failed: {data.get('error')}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-22)         break [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-24)     print("Still processing...") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-59-25)     time.sleep(2)`

#### Example 4: Global Webhook Configuration

Set a default webhook URL in your `config.yml` to avoid repeating it in every request:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-1) # config.yml [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-2) api: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-3)   crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-4)     # ... other settings ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-5)     webhook: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-6)       default_url: "https://your-app.com/webhook/default" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-7)       default_headers: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-60-8)         X-Webhook-Secret: "your-secret-token"`

Then submit jobs without webhook config:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-61-1) # Uses the global webhook configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-61-2) response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-61-3)     "http://localhost:11235/crawl/job", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-61-4)     json={"urls": ["https://example.com"]} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-61-5) )`

### Webhook Best Practices

1.  **Authentication:** Always use custom headers for webhook authentication
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-62-1) "webhook_headers": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-62-2)   "X-Webhook-Secret": "your-secret-token" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-62-3) }`
    
2.  **Idempotency:** Design your webhook handler to be idempotent (safe to receive duplicate notifications)
    
3.  **Fast Response:** Return HTTP 200 quickly; process data asynchronously if needed
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-63-1) @app.route('/webhook', methods=['POST']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-63-2) def webhook(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-63-3)     payload = request.json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-63-4)     # Queue for background processing [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-63-5)     queue.enqueue(process_webhook, payload) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-63-6)     return jsonify({"status": "received"}), 200`
    
4.  **Error Handling:** Handle both success and failure notifications
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-64-1) if payload['status'] == 'completed': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-64-2)     # Process success [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-64-3) elif payload['status'] == 'failed': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-64-4)     # Log error, retry, or alert`
    
5.  **Validation:** Verify webhook authenticity using custom headers
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-65-1) secret = request.headers.get('X-Webhook-Secret') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-65-2) if secret != os.environ['EXPECTED_SECRET']: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-65-3)     return jsonify({"error": "Unauthorized"}), 401`
    
6.  **Logging:** Log webhook deliveries for debugging
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-66-1) logger.info(f"Webhook received: {payload['task_id']} - {payload['status']}")`
    

### Use Cases

**1\. Batch Processing** Submit hundreds of URLs and get notified as each completes:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-67-1) urls = ["https://site1.com", "https://site2.com", ...] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-67-2) for url in urls: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-67-3)     submit_crawl_job(url, webhook_url="https://app.com/webhook")`

**2\. Microservice Integration** Integrate with event-driven architectures:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-1) # Service A submits job [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-2) task_id = submit_crawl_job(url) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-4) # Service B receives webhook and triggers next step [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-5) @app.route('/webhook') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-6) def webhook(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-7)     process_result(request.json) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-8)     trigger_next_service() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-68-9)     return "OK", 200`

**3\. Long-Running Extractions** Handle complex LLM extractions without timeouts:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-69-1) submit_llm_job( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-69-2)     url="https://long-article.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-69-3)     q="Comprehensive summary with key points and analysis", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-69-4)     webhook_url="https://app.com/webhook/llm" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-69-5) )`

### Troubleshooting

**Webhook not receiving notifications?** - Check your webhook URL is publicly accessible - Verify firewall/security group settings - Use webhook testing tools like webhook.site for debugging - Check server logs for delivery attempts - Ensure your handler returns 200-299 status code

**Job stuck in processing?** - Check Redis connection: `docker logs <container_name> | grep redis` - Verify worker processes: `docker exec <container_name> ps aux | grep worker` - Check server logs: `docker logs <container_name>`

**Need to cancel a job?** Jobs are processed asynchronously. If you need to cancel: - Delete the task from Redis (requires Redis CLI access) - Or implement a cancellation endpoint in your webhook handler

* * *

Dockerfile Parameters
---------------------

You can customize the image build process using build arguments (`--build-arg`). These are typically used via `docker buildx build` or within the `docker-compose.yml` file.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-1) # Example: Build with 'all' features using buildx [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-2) docker buildx build \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-3)   --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-4)   --build-arg INSTALL_TYPE=all \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-5)   -t yourname/crawl4ai-all:latest \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-6)   --load \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-70-7)   . # Build from root context`

### Build Arguments Explained

| Argument | Description | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| INSTALL\_TYPE | Feature set | `default` | `default`, `all`, `torch`, `transformer` |
| ENABLE\_GPU | GPU support (CUDA for AMD64) | `false` | `true`, `false` |
| APP\_HOME | Install path inside container (advanced) | `/app` | any valid path |
| USE\_LOCAL | Install library from local source | `true` | `true`, `false` |
| GITHUB\_REPO | Git repo to clone if USE\_LOCAL=false | _(see Dockerfile)_ | any git URL |
| GITHUB\_BRANCH | Git branch to clone if USE\_LOCAL=false | `main` | any branch name |

_(Note: PYTHON\_VERSION is fixed by the `FROM` instruction in the Dockerfile)_

### Build Best Practices

1.  **Choose the Right Install Type**
    *   `default`: Basic installation, smallest image size. Suitable for most standard web scraping and markdown generation.
    *   `all`: Full features including `torch` and `transformers` for advanced extraction strategies (e.g., CosineStrategy, certain LLM filters). Significantly larger image. Ensure you need these extras.
2.  **Platform Considerations**
    *   Use `buildx` for building multi-architecture images, especially for pushing to registries.
    *   Use `docker compose` profiles (`local-amd64`, `local-arm64`) for easy platform-specific local builds.
3.  **Performance Optimization**
    *   The image automatically includes platform-specific optimizations (OpenMP for AMD64, OpenBLAS for ARM64).

* * *

Using the API
-------------

Communicate with the running Docker server via its REST API (defaulting to `http://localhost:11235`). You can use the Python SDK or make direct HTTP requests.

### Playground Interface

A built-in web playground is available at `http://localhost:11235/playground` for testing and generating API requests. The playground allows you to:

1.  Configure `CrawlerRunConfig` and `BrowserConfig` using the main library's Python syntax
2.  Test crawling operations directly from the interface
3.  Generate corresponding JSON for REST API requests based on your configuration

This is the easiest way to translate Python configuration to JSON requests when building integrations.

### Python SDK

Install the SDK: `pip install crawl4ai`

The Python SDK provides a convenient way to interact with the Docker API, including **automatic hook conversion** when using function objects.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-2) from crawl4ai.docker_client import Crawl4aiDockerClient [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-3) from crawl4ai import BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-5) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-6)     # Point to the correct server port [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-7)     async with Crawl4aiDockerClient(base_url="http://localhost:11235", verbose=True) as client: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-8)         # If JWT is enabled on the server, authenticate first: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-9)         # await client.authenticate("user@example.com") # See Server Configuration section [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-11)         # Example Non-streaming crawl [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-12)         print("--- Running Non-Streaming Crawl ---") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-13)         results = await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-14)             ["https://httpbin.org/html"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-15)             browser_config=BrowserConfig(headless=True), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-16)             crawler_config=CrawlerRunConfig(cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-17)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-18)         if results: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-19)             print(f"Non-streaming results success: {results.success}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-20)             if results.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-21)                 for result in results: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-22)                     print(f"URL: {result.url}, Success: {result.success}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-23)         else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-24)             print("Non-streaming crawl failed.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-26)         # Example Streaming crawl [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-27)         print("\n--- Running Streaming Crawl ---") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-28)         stream_config = CrawlerRunConfig(stream=True, cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-29)         try: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-30)             async for result in await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-31)                 ["https://httpbin.org/html", "https://httpbin.org/links/5/0"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-32)                 browser_config=BrowserConfig(headless=True), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-33)                 crawler_config=stream_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-34)             ): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-35)                 print(f"Streamed result: URL: {result.url}, Success: {result.success}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-36)         except Exception as e: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-37)             print(f"Streaming crawl failed: {e}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-38) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-39)         # Example with hooks (Python function objects) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-40)         print("\n--- Crawl with Hooks ---") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-41) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-42)         async def my_hook(page, context, **kwargs): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-43)             """Custom hook to optimize performance""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-44)             await page.set_viewport_size({"width": 1920, "height": 1080}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-45)             await context.route("**/*.{png,jpg}", lambda r: r.abort()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-46)             print("[HOOK] Page optimized") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-47)             return page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-48) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-49)         result = await client.crawl( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-50)             ["https://httpbin.org/html"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-51)             browser_config=BrowserConfig(headless=True), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-52)             crawler_config=CrawlerRunConfig(cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-53)             hooks={"on_page_context_created": my_hook},  # Pass function directly! [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-54)             hooks_timeout=30 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-55)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-56)         print(f"Crawl with hooks success: {result.success}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-57) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-58)         # Example Get schema [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-59)         print("\n--- Getting Schema ---") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-60)         schema = await client.get_schema() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-61)         print(f"Schema received: {bool(schema)}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-62) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-63) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-71-64)     asyncio.run(main())`

#### SDK Parameters

The Docker client supports the following parameters:

**Client Initialization**: - `base_url` (str): URL of the Docker server (default: `http://localhost:8000`) - `timeout` (float): Request timeout in seconds (default: 30.0) - `verify_ssl` (bool): Verify SSL certificates (default: True) - `verbose` (bool): Enable verbose logging (default: True) - `log_file` (Optional\[str\]): Path to log file (default: None)

**crawl() Method**: - `urls` (List\[str\]): List of URLs to crawl - `browser_config` (Optional\[BrowserConfig\]): Browser configuration - `crawler_config` (Optional\[CrawlerRunConfig\]): Crawler configuration - `hooks` (Optional\[Dict\]): Hook functions or strings - **automatically converts function objects!** - `hooks_timeout` (int): Timeout for each hook execution in seconds (default: 30)

**Returns**: - Single URL: `CrawlResult` object - Multiple URLs: `List[CrawlResult]` - Streaming: `AsyncGenerator[CrawlResult]`

### Second Approach: Direct API Calls

Crucially, when sending configurations directly via JSON, they **must** follow the `{"type": "ClassName", "params": {...}}` structure for any non-primitive value (like config objects or strategies). Dictionaries must be wrapped as `{"type": "dict", "value": {...}}`.

_(Keep the detailed explanation of Configuration Structure, Basic Pattern, Simple vs Complex, Strategy Pattern, Complex Nested Example, Quick Grammar Overview, Important Rules, Pro Tip)_

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-72-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-72-2)     "crawler_config": { "JsonCssExtractionStrategy", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-72-7)                 "params": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-72-8) "type": "html"} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-72-15)                            ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-72-16)
