### LLM Configuration Examples

The Docker API supports dynamic LLM configuration through multiple levels:

#### Temperature Control

Temperature affects the randomness of LLM responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very creative):

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-1) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-3) # Low temperature for factual extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-4) response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-5)     "http://localhost:11235/md", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-6)     json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-7)         "url": "https://example.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-8)         "f": "llm", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-9)         "q": "Extract all dates and numbers from this page", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-10)         "temperature": 0.2  # Very focused, deterministic [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-11)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-12) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-14) # High temperature for creative tasks [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-15) response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-16)     "http://localhost:11235/md", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-17)     json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-18)         "url": "https://example.com",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-19)         "f": "llm", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-20)         "q": "Write a creative summary of this content", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-21)         "temperature": 1.2  # More creative, varied responses [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-22)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-73-23) )`

#### Custom API Endpoints

Use custom base URLs for proxy servers or alternative API endpoints:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-1) # Using a local LLM server [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-2) response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-3)     "http://localhost:11235/md", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-4)     json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-5)         "url": "https://example.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-6)         "f": "llm", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-7)         "q": "Extract key information", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-8)         "provider": "ollama/llama2", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-9)         "base_url": "http://localhost:11434/v1" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-10)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-74-11) )`

#### Dynamic Provider Selection

Switch between providers based on task requirements:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-1) async def smart_extraction(url: str, content_type: str): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-2)     """Select provider and temperature based on content type""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-4)     configs = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-5)         "technical": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-6)             "provider": "openai/gpt-4", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-7)             "temperature": 0.3, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-8)             "query": "Extract technical specifications and code examples" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-9)         }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-10)         "creative": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-11)             "provider": "anthropic/claude-3-opus", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-12)             "temperature": 0.9, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-13)             "query": "Create an engaging narrative summary" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-14)         }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-15)         "quick": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-16)             "provider": "groq/mixtral-8x7b", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-17)             "temperature": 0.5, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-18)             "query": "Quick summary in bullet points" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-19)         } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-20)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-21) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-22)     config = configs.get(content_type, configs["quick"]) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-24)     response = await httpx.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-25)         "http://localhost:11235/md", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-26)         json={ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-27)             "url": url, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-28)             "f": "llm", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-29)             "q": config["query"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-30)             "provider": config["provider"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-31)             "temperature": config["temperature"] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-32)         } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-33)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-34) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-75-35)     return response.json()`

### REST API Examples

Update URLs to use port `11235`.

#### Simple Crawl

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-1) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-3) # Configuration objects converted to the required JSON structure [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-4) browser_config_payload = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-5)     "type": "BrowserConfig", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-6)     "params": {"headless": True} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-7) } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-8) crawler_config_payload = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-9)     "type": "CrawlerRunConfig", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-10)     "params": {"stream": False, "cache_mode": "bypass"} # Use string value of enum [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-11) } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-13) crawl_payload = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-14)     "urls": ["https://httpbin.org/html"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-15)     "browser_config": browser_config_payload, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-16)     "crawler_config": crawler_config_payload [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-17) } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-18) response = requests.post( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-19)     "http://localhost:11235/crawl", # Updated port [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-20)     # headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"},  # If JWT is enabled [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-21)     json=crawl_payload [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-22) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-23) print(f"Status Code: {response.status_code}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-24) if response.ok: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-25)     print(response.json()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-26) else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-76-27)     print(f"Error: {response.text}")`

#### Streaming Results

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-1) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-2) import httpx # Use httpx for async streaming example [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-4) async def test_stream_crawl(token: str = None): # Made token optional [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-5)     """Test the /crawl/stream endpoint with multiple URLs.""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-6)     url = "http://localhost:11235/crawl/stream" # Updated port [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-7)     payload = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-8)         "urls": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-9)             "https://httpbin.org/html", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-10)             "https://httpbin.org/links/5/0", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-11)         ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-12)         "browser_config": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-13)             "type": "BrowserConfig", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-14)             "params": {"headless": True, "viewport": {"type": "dict", "value": {"width": 1200, "height": 800}}} # Viewport needs type:dict [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-15)         }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-16)         "crawler_config": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-17)             "type": "CrawlerRunConfig", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-18)             "params": {"stream": True, "cache_mode": "bypass"} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-19)         } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-20)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-21) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-22)     headers = {} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-23)     # if token: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-24)     #    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"} # If JWT is enabled [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-26)     try: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-27)         async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-28)             async with client.stream("POST", url, json=payload, headers=headers, timeout=120.0) as response: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-29)                 print(f"Status: {response.status_code} (Expected: 200)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-30)                 response.raise_for_status() # Raise exception for bad status codes [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-31) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-32)                 # Read streaming response line-by-line (NDJSON) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-33)                 async for line in response.aiter_lines(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-34)                     if line: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-35)                         try: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-36)                             data = json.loads(line) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-37)                             # Check for completion marker [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-38)                             if data.get("status") == "completed": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-39)                                 print("Stream completed.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-40)                                 break [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-41)                             print(f"Streamed Result: {json.dumps(data, indent=2)}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-42)                         except json.JSONDecodeError: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-43)                             print(f"Warning: Could not decode JSON line: {line}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-44) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-45)     except httpx.HTTPStatusError as e: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-46)          print(f"HTTP error occurred: {e.response.status_code} - {e.response.text}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-47)     except Exception as e: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-48)         print(f"Error in streaming crawl test: {str(e)}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-49) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-50) # To run this example: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-51) # import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-77-52) # asyncio.run(test_stream_crawl())`

* * *

Real-time Monitoring & Operations
---------------------------------

One of the key advantages of self-hosting is complete visibility into your infrastructure. Crawl4AI includes a comprehensive real-time monitoring system that gives you full transparency and control.

### Monitoring Dashboard

Access the **built-in real-time monitoring dashboard** for complete operational visibility:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-78-1) http://localhost:11235/monitor`

![Monitoring Dashboard](https://via.placeholder.com/800x400?text=Crawl4AI+Monitoring+Dashboard)

**Dashboard Features:**

#### 1\. System Health Overview

*   **CPU & Memory**: Live usage with progress bars and percentage indicators
*   **Network I/O**: Total bytes sent/received since startup
*   **Server Uptime**: How long your server has been running
*   **Browser Pool Status**:
*   🔥 Permanent browser (always-on default config, ~270MB)
*   ♨️ Hot pool (frequently used configs, ~180MB each)
*   ❄️ Cold pool (idle browsers awaiting cleanup, ~180MB each)
*   **Memory Pressure**: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH indicator for janitor behavior

#### 2\. Live Request Tracking

*   **Active Requests**: Currently running crawls with:
*   Request ID for tracking
*   Target URL (truncated for display)
*   Endpoint being used
*   Elapsed time (updates in real-time)
*   Memory usage from start
*   **Completed Requests**: Last 10 finished requests showing:
*   Success/failure status (color-coded)
*   Total execution time
*   Memory delta (how much memory changed)
*   Pool hit (was browser reused?)
*   HTTP status code
*   **Filtering**: View all, success only, or errors only

#### 3\. Browser Pool Management

Interactive table showing all active browsers:

| Type | Signature | Age | Last Used | Hits | Actions |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| permanent | abc12345 | 2h  | 5s ago | 1,247 | Restart |
| hot | def67890 | 45m | 2m ago | 89  | Kill / Restart |
| cold | ghi11213 | 30m | 15m ago | 3   | Kill / Restart |

*   **Reuse Rate**: Percentage of requests that reused existing browsers
*   **Memory Estimates**: Total memory used by browser pool
*   **Manual Control**: Kill or restart individual browsers

#### 4\. Janitor Events Log

Real-time log of browser pool cleanup events: - When cold browsers are closed due to memory pressure - When browsers are promoted from cold to hot pool - Forced cleanups triggered manually - Detailed cleanup reasons and browser signatures

#### 5\. Error Monitoring

Recent errors with full context: - Timestamp - Endpoint where error occurred - Target URL - Error message - Request ID for correlation

**Live Updates:** The dashboard connects via WebSocket and refreshes every **2 seconds** with the latest data. Connection status indicator shows when you're connected/disconnected.

* * *

### Monitor API Endpoints

For programmatic monitoring, automation, and integration with your existing infrastructure:

#### Health & Statistics

**Get System Health**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-79-1) GET /monitor/health`

Returns current system snapshot:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-2)   "container": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-3)     "memory_percent": 45.2, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-4)     "cpu_percent": 23.1, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-5)     "network_sent_mb": 1250.45, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-6)     "network_recv_mb": 3421.12, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-7)     "uptime_seconds": 7234 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-8)   }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-9)   "pool": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-10)     "permanent": {"active": true, "memory_mb": 270}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-11)     "hot": {"count": 3, "memory_mb": 540}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-12)     "cold": {"count": 1, "memory_mb": 180}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-13)     "total_memory_mb": 990 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-14)   }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-15)   "janitor": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-16)     "next_cleanup_estimate": "adaptive", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-17)     "memory_pressure": "MEDIUM" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-18)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-80-19) }`

**Get Request Statistics**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-81-1) GET /monitor/requests?status=all&limit=50`

Query parameters: - `status`: Filter by `all`, `active`, `completed`, `success`, or `error` - `limit`: Number of completed requests to return (1-1000)

**Get Browser Pool Details**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-82-1) GET /monitor/browsers`

Returns detailed information about all active browsers:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-2)   "browsers": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-3)     { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-4)       "type": "permanent", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-5)       "sig": "abc12345", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-6)       "age_seconds": 7234, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-7)       "last_used_seconds": 5, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-8)       "memory_mb": 270, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-9)       "hits": 1247, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-10)       "killable": false [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-11)     }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-12)     { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-13)       "type": "hot", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-14)       "sig": "def67890", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-15)       "age_seconds": 2701, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-16)       "last_used_seconds": 120, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-17)       "memory_mb": 180, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-18)       "hits": 89, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-19)       "killable": true [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-20)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-21)   ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-22)   "summary": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-23)     "total_count": 5, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-24)     "total_memory_mb": 990, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-25)     "reuse_rate_percent": 87.3 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-26)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-83-27) }`

**Get Endpoint Performance Statistics**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-84-1) GET /monitor/endpoints/stats`

Returns aggregated metrics per endpoint:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-2)   "/crawl": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-3)     "count": 1523, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-4)     "avg_latency_ms": 2341.5, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-5)     "success_rate_percent": 98.2, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-6)     "pool_hit_rate_percent": 89.1, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-7)     "errors": 27 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-8)   }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-9)   "/md": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-10)     "count": 891, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-11)     "avg_latency_ms": 1823.7, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-12)     "success_rate_percent": 99.4, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-13)     "pool_hit_rate_percent": 92.3, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-14)     "errors": 5 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-15)   } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-85-16) }`

**Get Timeline Data**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-86-1) GET /monitor/timeline?metric=memory&window=5m`

Parameters: - `metric`: `memory`, `requests`, or `browsers` - `window`: Currently only `5m` (5-minute window, 5-second resolution)

Returns time-series data for charts:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-87-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-87-2)   "timestamps": [1699564800, 1699564805, 1699564810, ...], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-87-3)   "values": [42.1, 43.5, 41.8, ...] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-87-4) }`

#### Logs

**Get Janitor Events**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-88-1) GET /monitor/logs/janitor?limit=100`

**Get Error Log**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-89-1) GET /monitor/logs/errors?limit=100`

* * *

### WebSocket Streaming

For real-time monitoring in your own dashboards or applications:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-90-1) WS /monitor/ws`

**Connection Example (Python):**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-2) import websockets [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-3) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-5) async def monitor_server(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-6)     uri = "ws://localhost:11235/monitor/ws" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-7) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-8)     async with websockets.connect(uri) as websocket: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-9)         print("Connected to Crawl4AI monitor") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-11)         while True: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-12)             # Receive update every 2 seconds [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-13)             data = await websocket.recv() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-14)             update = json.loads(data) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-16)             # Extract key metrics [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-17)             health = update['health'] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-18)             active_requests = len(update['requests']['active']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-19)             browsers = len(update['browsers']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-20) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-21)             print(f"Memory: {health['container']['memory_percent']:.1f}% | " [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-22)                   f"Active: {active_requests} | " [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-23)                   f"Browsers: {browsers}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-24) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-25)             # Check for high memory pressure [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-26)             if health['janitor']['memory_pressure'] == 'HIGH': [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-27)                 print("⚠️  HIGH MEMORY PRESSURE - Consider cleanup") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-28) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-91-29) asyncio.run(monitor_server())`

**Update Payload Structure:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-2)   "timestamp": 1699564823.456, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-3)   "health": { /* System health snapshot */ }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-4)   "requests": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-5)     "active": [ /* Currently running */ ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-6)     "completed": [ /* Last 10 completed */ ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-7)   }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-8)   "browsers": [ /* All active browsers */ ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-9)   "timeline": { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-10)     "memory": { /* Last 5 minutes */ }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-11)     "requests": { /* Request rate */ }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-12)     "browsers": { /* Pool composition */ } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-13)   }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-14)   "janitor": [ /* Last 10 cleanup events */ ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-15)   "errors": [ /* Last 10 errors */ ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-92-16) }`

* * *

### Control Actions

Take manual control when needed:

**Force Immediate Cleanup**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-93-1) POST /monitor/actions/cleanup`

Kills all cold pool browsers immediately (useful when memory is tight):

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-94-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-94-2)   "success": true, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-94-3)   "killed_browsers": 3 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-94-4) }`

**Kill Specific Browser**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-95-1) POST /monitor/actions/kill_browser [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-95-2) Content-Type: application/json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-95-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-95-4) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-95-5)   "sig": "abc12345"  // First 8 chars of browser signature [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-95-6) }`

Response:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-96-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-96-2)   "success": true, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-96-3)   "killed_sig": "abc12345", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-96-4)   "pool_type": "hot" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-96-5) }`

**Restart Browser**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-97-1) POST /monitor/actions/restart_browser [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-97-2) Content-Type: application/json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-97-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-97-4) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-97-5)   "sig": "permanent"  // Or first 8 chars of signature [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-97-6) }`

For permanent browser, this will close and reinitialize it. For hot/cold browsers, it kills them and lets new requests create fresh ones.

**Reset Statistics**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-98-1) POST /monitor/stats/reset`

Clears endpoint counters (useful for starting fresh after testing).

* * *

### Production Integration

#### Integration with Existing Monitoring Systems

**Prometheus Integration:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-99-1) # Scrape metrics endpoint [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-99-2) curl http://localhost:11235/metrics`

**Custom Dashboard Integration:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-1) # Example: Push metrics to your monitoring system [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-2) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-3) import websockets [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-4) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-5) from your_monitoring import push_metric [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-7) async def integrate_monitoring(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-8)     async with websockets.connect("ws://localhost:11235/monitor/ws") as ws: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-9)         while True: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-10)             data = json.loads(await ws.recv()) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-12)             # Push to your monitoring system [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-13)             push_metric("crawl4ai.memory.percent", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-14)                        data['health']['container']['memory_percent']) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-15)             push_metric("crawl4ai.active_requests", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-16)                        len(data['requests']['active'])) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-17)             push_metric("crawl4ai.browser_count", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-100-18)                        len(data['browsers']))`

**Alerting Example:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-1) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-2) import time [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-4) def check_health(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-5)     """Poll health endpoint and alert on issues""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-6)     response = requests.get("http://localhost:11235/monitor/health") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-7)     health = response.json() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-9)     # Alert on high memory [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-10)     if health['container']['memory_percent'] > 85: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-11)         send_alert(f"High memory: {health['container']['memory_percent']}%") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-12) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-13)     # Alert on high error rate [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-14)     stats = requests.get("http://localhost:11235/monitor/endpoints/stats").json() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-15)     for endpoint, metrics in stats.items(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-16)         if metrics['success_rate_percent'] < 95: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-17)             send_alert(f"{endpoint} success rate: {metrics['success_rate_percent']}%") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-19) # Run every minute [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-20) while True: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-21)     check_health() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-101-22)     time.sleep(60)`

**Log Aggregation:**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-1) import requests [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-2) from datetime import datetime [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-4) def aggregate_errors(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-5)     """Fetch and aggregate errors for logging system""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-6)     response = requests.get("http://localhost:11235/monitor/logs/errors?limit=100") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-7)     errors = response.json()['errors'] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-9)     for error in errors: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-10)         log_to_system({ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-11)             'timestamp': datetime.fromtimestamp(error['timestamp']), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-12)             'service': 'crawl4ai', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-13)             'endpoint': error['endpoint'], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-14)             'url': error['url'], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-15)             'message': error['error'], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-16)             'request_id': error['request_id'] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-102-17)         })`

#### Key Metrics to Track

For production self-hosted deployments, monitor these metrics:

1.  **Memory Usage Trends**
2.  Track `container.memory_percent` over time
3.  Alert when consistently above 80%
4.  Prevents OOM kills
    
5.  **Request Success Rates**
    
6.  Monitor per-endpoint success rates
7.  Alert when below 95%
8.  Indicates crawling issues
    
9.  **Average Latency**
    
10.  Track `avg_latency_ms` per endpoint
11.  Detect performance degradation
12.  Optimize slow endpoints
    
13.  **Browser Pool Efficiency**
    
14.  Monitor `reuse_rate_percent`
15.  Should be >80% for good efficiency
16.  Low rates indicate pool churn
    
17.  **Error Frequency**
    
18.  Count errors per time window
19.  Alert on sudden spikes
20.  Track error patterns
    
21.  **Janitor Activity**
    
22.  Monitor cleanup frequency
23.  Excessive cleanup indicates memory pressure
24.  Adjust pool settings if needed

* * *

### Quick Health Check

For simple uptime monitoring:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-103-1) curl http://localhost:11235/health`

Returns:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-104-1) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-104-2)   "status": "healthy", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-104-3)   "version": "0.7.4" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-104-4) }`

Other useful endpoints: - `/metrics` - Prometheus metrics - `/schema` - Full API schema

* * *

Server Configuration
--------------------

The server's behavior can be customized through the `config.yml` file.

### Understanding config.yml

The configuration file is loaded from `/app/config.yml` inside the container. By default, the file from `deploy/docker/config.yml` in the repository is copied there during the build.

Here's a detailed breakdown of the configuration options (using defaults from `deploy/docker/config.yml`):

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-1) # Application Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-2) app: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-3)   title: "Crawl4AI API" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-4)   version: "1.0.0" # Consider setting this to match library version, e.g., "0.5.1" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-5)   host: "0.0.0.0" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-6)   port: 8020 # NOTE: This port is used ONLY when running server.py directly. Gunicorn overrides this (see supervisord.conf). [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-7)   reload: False # Default set to False - suitable for production [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-8)   timeout_keep_alive: 300 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-10) # Default LLM Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-11) llm: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-12)   provider: "openai/gpt-4o-mini"  # Can be overridden by LLM_PROVIDER env var [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-13)   # api_key: sk-...  # If you pass the API key directly (not recommended) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-14)   # temperature and base_url are controlled via environment variables or request parameters [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-16) # Redis Configuration (Used by internal Redis server managed by supervisord) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-17) redis: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-18)   host: "localhost" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-19)   port: 6379 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-20)   db: 0 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-21)   password: "" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-22)   # ... other redis options ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-24) # Rate Limiting Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-25) rate_limiting: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-26)   enabled: True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-27)   default_limit: "1000/minute" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-28)   trusted_proxies: [] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-29)   storage_uri: "memory://"  # Use "redis://localhost:6379" if you need persistent/shared limits [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-30) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-31) # Security Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-32) security: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-33)   enabled: false # Master toggle for security features [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-34)   jwt_enabled: false # Enable JWT authentication (requires security.enabled=true) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-35)   https_redirect: false # Force HTTPS (requires security.enabled=true) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-36)   trusted_hosts: ["*"] # Allowed hosts (use specific domains in production) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-37)   headers: # Security headers (applied if security.enabled=true) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-38)     x_content_type_options: "nosniff" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-39)     x_frame_options: "DENY" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-40)     content_security_policy: "default-src 'self'" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-41)     strict_transport_security: "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-42) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-43) # Crawler Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-44) crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-45)   memory_threshold_percent: 95.0 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-46)   rate_limiter: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-47)     base_delay: [1.0, 2.0] # Min/max delay between requests in seconds for dispatcher [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-48)   timeouts: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-49)     stream_init: 30.0  # Timeout for stream initialization [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-50)     batch_process: 300.0 # Timeout for non-streaming /crawl processing [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-51) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-52) # Logging Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-53) logging: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-54)   level: "INFO" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-55)   format: "%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-56) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-57) # Observability Configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-58) observability: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-59)   prometheus: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-60)     enabled: True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-61)     endpoint: "/metrics" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-62)   health_check: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-105-63)     endpoint: "/health"`

_(JWT Authentication section remains the same, just note the default port is now 11235 for requests)_

_(Configuration Tips and Best Practices remain the same)_

### Customizing Your Configuration

You can override the default `config.yml`.

#### Method 1: Modify Before Build

1.  Edit the `deploy/docker/config.yml` file in your local repository clone.
2.  Build the image using `docker buildx` or `docker compose --profile local-... up --build`. The modified file will be copied into the image.

#### Method 2: Runtime Mount (Recommended for Custom Deploys)

1.  Create your custom configuration file, e.g., `my-custom-config.yml` locally. Ensure it contains all necessary sections.
2.  Mount it when running the container:
    
    *   **Using `docker run`:**
        
        `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-1) # Assumes my-custom-config.yml is in the current directory [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-2) docker run -d -p 11235:11235 \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-3)   --name crawl4ai-custom-config \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-4)   --env-file .llm.env \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-5)   --shm-size=1g \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-6)   -v $(pwd)/my-custom-config.yml:/app/config.yml \ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-106-7)   unclecode/crawl4ai:latest # Or your specific tag`
        
    *   **Using `docker-compose.yml`:** Add a `volumes` section to the service definition:
        
        `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-1) services: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-2)   crawl4ai-hub-amd64: # Or your chosen service [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-3)     image: unclecode/crawl4ai:latest [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-4)     profiles: ["hub-amd64"] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-5)     <<: *base-config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-6)     volumes: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-7)       # Mount local custom config over the default one in the container [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-8)       - ./my-custom-config.yml:/app/config.yml [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-9)       # Keep the shared memory volume from base-config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/core/self-hosting/#__codelineno-107-10)       - /dev/shm:/dev/shm`
        
        _(Note: Ensure `my-custom-config.yml` is in the same directory as `docker-compose.yml`)_
        

> 💡 When mounting, your custom file _completely replaces_ the default one. Ensure it's a valid and complete configuration.

### Configuration Recommendations

1.  **Security First** 🔒
2.  Always enable security in production
3.  Use specific trusted\_hosts instead of wildcards
4.  Set up proper rate limiting to protect your server
5.  Consider your environment before enabling HTTPS redirect
    
6.  **Resource Management** 💻
    
7.  Adjust memory\_threshold\_percent based on available RAM
8.  Set timeouts according to your content size and network conditions
9.  Use Redis for rate limiting in multi-container setups
    
10.  **Monitoring** 📊
    
11.  Enable Prometheus if you need metrics
12.  Set DEBUG logging in development, INFO in production
13.  Regular health check monitoring is crucial
    
14.  **Performance Tuning** ⚡
    
15.  Start with conservative rate limiter delays
16.  Increase batch\_process timeout for large content
17.  Adjust stream\_init timeout based on initial response times

Getting Help
------------

We're here to help you succeed with Crawl4AI! Here's how to get support:

*   📖 Check our [full documentation](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/)
    
*   🐛 Found a bug? [Open an issue](https://github.com/unclecode/crawl4ai/issues)
    
*   💬 Join our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/crawl4ai)
    
*   ⭐ Star us on GitHub to show support!

Summary
-------

Congratulations! You now have everything you need to self-host your own Crawl4AI infrastructure with complete control and visibility.

**What You've Learned:** - ✅ Multiple deployment options (Docker Hub, Docker Compose, manual builds) - ✅ Environment configuration and LLM integration - ✅ Using the interactive playground for testing - ✅ Making API requests with proper typing (SDK and REST) - ✅ Specialized endpoints (screenshots, PDFs, JavaScript execution) - ✅ MCP integration for AI-assisted development - ✅ **Real-time monitoring dashboard** for operational transparency - ✅ **Monitor API** for programmatic control and integration - ✅ Production deployment best practices

**Why This Matters:**

By self-hosting Crawl4AI, you: - 🔒 **Own Your Data**: Everything stays in your infrastructure - 📊 **See Everything**: Real-time dashboard shows exactly what's happening - 💰 **Control Costs**: Scale within your resources, no per-request fees - ⚡ **Maximize Performance**: Direct access with smart browser pooling (10x memory efficiency) - 🛡️ **Stay Secure**: Keep sensitive workflows behind your firewall - 🔧 **Customize Freely**: Full control over configs, strategies, and optimizations

**Next Steps:**

1.  **Start Simple**: Deploy with Docker Hub image and test with the playground
2.  **Monitor Everything**: Open `http://localhost:11235/monitor` to watch your server
3.  **Integrate**: Connect your applications using the Python SDK or REST API
4.  **Scale Smart**: Use the monitoring data to optimize your deployment
5.  **Go Production**: Set up alerting, log aggregation, and automated cleanup

**Key Resources:** - 🎮 **Playground**: `http://localhost:11235/playground` - Interactive testing - 📊 **Monitor Dashboard**: `http://localhost:11235/monitor` - Real-time visibility - 📖 **Architecture Docs**: `deploy/docker/ARCHITECTURE.md` - Deep technical dive - 💬 **Discord Community**: Get help and share experiences - ⭐ **GitHub**: Report issues, contribute, show support

Remember: The monitoring dashboard is your window into your infrastructure. Use it to understand performance, troubleshoot issues, and optimize your deployment. The examples in the `examples` folder show real-world usage patterns you can adapt.

**You're now in control of your web crawling destiny!** 🚀

Happy crawling! 🕷️

# Brand Book - Crawl4AI Documentation (v0.8.x)

🎨 Crawl4AI Brand Book
======================

Crawl4AI Brand Guidelines
=========================

A comprehensive design system for building consistent, terminal-inspired experiences

📖 About This Guide
-------------------

This brand book documents the complete visual language of Crawl4AI. Whether you're building documentation pages, interactive apps, or Chrome extensions, these guidelines ensure consistency while maintaining the unique terminal-aesthetic that defines our brand.

* * *

🎨

Color System
------------

Our color palette is built around a terminal-dark aesthetic with vibrant cyan and pink accents. Every color serves a purpose and maintains accessibility standards.

### Primary Colors

Primary Cyan

`#50ffff`

Main brand color, links, highlights, CTAs

Primary Teal

`#09b5a5`

Hover states, dimmed accents, progress bars

Primary Green

`#0fbbaa`

Alternative primary, buttons, nav links

Accent Pink

`#f380f5`

Secondary accents, keywords, highlights

### Background Colors

Deep Black

`#070708`

Main background, code blocks, deep containers

Secondary Dark

`#1a1a1a`

Headers, sidebars, secondary containers

Tertiary Gray

`#3f3f44`

Cards, borders, code backgrounds, modals

Block Background

`#202020`

Block elements, alternate rows

### Text Colors

Primary Text

`#e8e9ed`

Headings, body text, primary content

Secondary Text

`#d5cec0`

Body text, descriptions, warm tone

Tertiary Text

`#a3abba`

Captions, labels, metadata, cool tone

Dimmed Text

`#8b857a`

Disabled states, comments, subtle text

### Semantic Colors

Success Green

`#50ff50`

Success messages, completed states, valid

Error Red

`#ff3c74`

Errors, warnings, destructive actions

Warning Orange

`#f59e0b`

Warnings, beta status, caution

Info Blue

`#4a9eff`

Info messages, external links

* * *

✍️

Typography
----------

Our typography system is built around **Dank Mono**, a monospace font that reinforces the terminal aesthetic while maintaining excellent readability.

### Font Family

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-0-1) --font-primary: 'Dank Mono', dm, Monaco, Courier New, monospace; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-0-2) --font-code: 'Dank Mono', 'Monaco', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace;`

**Font Weights:** - Regular: 400 - Bold: 700 - Italic: 400 (italic variant)

### Type Scale

H1 / Hero

Size: 2.5rem (40px) Weight: 700 Line-height: 1.2

The Quick Brown Fox Jumps Over
==============================

H2 / Section

Size: 1.75rem (28px) Weight: 700 Line-height: 1.3

Advanced Web Scraping Features
------------------------------

H3 / Subsection

Size: 1.3rem (20.8px) Weight: 600 Line-height: 1.4

### Installation and Setup Guide

H4 / Component

Size: 1.1rem (17.6px) Weight: 600 Line-height: 1.4

#### Quick Start Instructions

Body / Regular

Size: 14px Weight: 400 Line-height: 1.6

Crawl4AI is the #1 trending GitHub repository, actively maintained by a vibrant community. It delivers blazing-fast, AI-ready web crawling tailored for large language models and data pipelines.

Code / Monospace

Size: 13px Weight: 400 Line-height: 1.5

`async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler:`

Small / Caption

Size: 12px Weight: 400 Line-height: 1.5

Updated 2 hours ago • v0.7.2

* * *

🧩

* * *

📐

Spacing & Layout
----------------

### Spacing System

Our spacing system is based on multiples of **10px** for consistency and ease of calculation.

10px - Extra Small (xs)

20px - Small (sm)

30px - Medium (md)

40px - Large (lg)

60px - Extra Large (xl)

80px - 2XL

### Layout Patterns

#### Terminal Container

Full-height, flex-column layout with sticky header

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-1-1) .terminal-container { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-1-2)     min-height: 100vh; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-1-3)     display: flex; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-1-4)     flex-direction: column; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-1-5) }`

#### Content Grid

Auto-fit responsive grid for cards and components

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-2-1) .component-grid { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-2-2)     display: grid; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-2-3)     grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-2-4)     gap: 2rem; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-2-5) }`

#### Centered Content

Maximum width with auto margins for centered layouts

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-3-1) .content { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-3-2)     max-width: 1200px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-3-3)     margin: 0 auto; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-3-4)     padding: 2rem; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-3-5) }`

* * *

✅

Usage Guidelines
----------------

### When to Use Each Style

**Documentation Pages (`docs/md_v2/core`, `/advanced`, etc.)** - Use main documentation styles from `styles.css` and `layout.css` - Terminal theme with sidebar navigation - Dense, informative content - ToC on the right side - Focus on readability and technical accuracy

**Landing Pages (`docs/md_v2/apps/crawl4ai-assistant`, etc.)** - Use `assistant.css` style approach - Hero sections with gradients - Feature cards with hover effects - Video/demo sections - Sticky header with navigation - Marketing-focused, visually engaging

**App Home (`docs/md_v2/apps/index.md`)** - Grid-based card layouts - Status badges - Call-to-action buttons - Feature highlights - Mix of informational and promotional

**Interactive Apps (`docs/md_v2/apps/llmtxt`, `/c4a-script`)** - Full-screen application layouts - Interactive controls - Real-time feedback - Tool-specific UI patterns - Functional over decorative

**Chrome Extension (`popup.css`)** - Compact, fixed-width design (380px) - Clear mode selection - Session indicators - Minimal but effective - Fast loading, no heavy assets

### Do's and Don'ts

✅ DO

Launch App →

Use primary cyan for main CTAs and important actions

❌ DON'T

Launch App →

Don't use arbitrary colors not in the brand palette

✅ DO

`async with AsyncWebCrawler():`

Use Dank Mono for all text to maintain terminal aesthetic

❌ DON'T

async with AsyncWebCrawler():

Don't use non-monospace fonts (breaks terminal feel)

✅ DO

Beta

#### New Feature

Use status badges to indicate feature maturity

❌ DON'T

#### New Feature (Beta)

Don't put status indicators in plain text

* * *

🎯

Accessibility
-------------

### Color Contrast

All color combinations meet WCAG AA standards:

*   **Primary Cyan (#50ffff) on Dark (#070708)**: 12.4:1 ✅
*   **Primary Text (#e8e9ed) on Dark (#070708)**: 11.8:1 ✅
*   **Secondary Text (#d5cec0) on Dark (#070708)**: 9.2:1 ✅
*   **Tertiary Text (#a3abba) on Dark (#070708)**: 6.8:1 ✅

### Focus States

All interactive elements must have visible focus indicators:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-4-1) button:focus, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-4-2) a:focus { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-4-3)     outline: 2px solid #50ffff; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-4-4)     outline-offset: 2px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-4-5) }`

### Motion

Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` for users who need it:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-5-1) @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-5-2)     * { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-5-3)         animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-5-4)         transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-5-5)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-5-6) }`

* * *

💾

CSS Variables
-------------

Use these CSS variables for consistency across all styles:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-1) :root { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-2)     /* Colors */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-3)     --primary-color: #50ffff; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-4)     --primary-dimmed: #09b5a5; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-5)     --primary-green: #0fbbaa; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-6)     --accent-color: #f380f5; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-7) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-8)     /* Backgrounds */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-9)     --background-color: #070708; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-10)     --bg-secondary: #1a1a1a; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-11)     --code-bg-color: #3f3f44; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-12)     --border-color: #3f3f44; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-14)     /* Text */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-15)     --font-color: #e8e9ed; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-16)     --secondary-color: #d5cec0; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-17)     --tertiary-color: #a3abba; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-19)     /* Semantic */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-20)     --success-color: #50ff50; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-21)     --error-color: #ff3c74; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-22)     --warning-color: #f59e0b; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-24)     /* Typography */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-25)     --font-primary: 'Dank Mono', dm, Monaco, Courier New, monospace; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-26)     --global-font-size: 14px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-27)     --global-line-height: 1.6; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-28) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-29)     /* Spacing */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-30)     --global-space: 10px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-31) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-32)     /* Layout */ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-33)     --header-height: 65px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-34)     --sidebar-width: 280px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-35)     --toc-width: 340px; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-36)     --content-max-width: 90em; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/branding/#__codelineno-6-37) }`

### Questions?

If you're unsure about which style to use or need help implementing these guidelines:

*   Check existing examples in the relevant section
*   Review the "When to Use Each Style" guidelines above
*   Ask in our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/crawl4ai)
    
*   Open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/unclecode/crawl4ai)
    

* * *

### 🎨 Keep It Terminal

When in doubt, ask yourself: "Does this feel like a terminal?" If yes, you're on brand.
