`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-5)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-6)         # Target article body and sidebar, but not other content [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-7)         target_elements=["article.main-content", "aside.sidebar"] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-9)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-10)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-11)             url="https://example.com/blog-post",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-12)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-13)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-14)         print("Markdown focused on target elements") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-15)         print("Links from entire page still available:", len(result.links.get("internal", []))) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-16) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-17) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-111-18)     asyncio.run(main())`

**Key difference**: With `target_elements`, the markdown generation and structural data extraction focus on those elements, but other page elements (like links, images, and tables) are still extracted from the entire page. This gives you fine-grained control over what appears in your markdown content while preserving full page context for link analysis and media collection.

2\. Content Filtering & Exclusions
----------------------------------

### 2.1 Basic Overview

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-1) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-2)     # Content thresholds [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-3)     word_count_threshold=10,        # Minimum words per block [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-5)     # Tag exclusions [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-6)     excluded_tags=['form', 'header', 'footer', 'nav'], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-7) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-8)     # Link filtering [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-9)     exclude_external_links=True,     [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-10)     exclude_social_media_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-11)     # Block entire domains [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-12)     exclude_domains=["adtrackers.com", "spammynews.org"],     [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-13)     exclude_social_media_domains=["facebook.com", "twitter.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-14) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-15)     # Media filtering [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-16)     exclude_external_images=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-112-17) )`

\- **`word_count_threshold`**: Ignores text blocks under X words. Helps skip trivial blocks like short nav or disclaimers.  
\- **`excluded_tags`**: Removes entire tags (`<form>`, `<header>`, `<footer>`, etc.).  
\- **Link Filtering**:  
\- `exclude_external_links`: Strips out external links and may remove them from `result.links`.  
\- `exclude_social_media_links`: Removes links pointing to known social media domains.  
\- `exclude_domains`: A custom list of domains to block if discovered in links.  
\- `exclude_social_media_domains`: A curated list (override or add to it) for social media sites.  
\- **Media Filtering**:  
\- `exclude_external_images`: Discards images not hosted on the same domain as the main page (or its subdomains). By default in case you set `exclude_social_media_links=True`, the following social media domains are excluded:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-1) [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-2)     'facebook.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-3)     'twitter.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-4)     'x.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-5)     'linkedin.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-6)     'instagram.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-7)     'pinterest.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-8)     'tiktok.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-9)     'snapchat.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-10)     'reddit.com', [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-113-11) ]`

### 2.2 Example Usage

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-5)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-6)         css_selector="main.content",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-7)         word_count_threshold=10, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-8)         excluded_tags=["nav", "footer"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-9)         exclude_external_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-10)         exclude_social_media_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-11)         exclude_domains=["ads.com", "spammytrackers.net"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-12)         exclude_external_images=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-13)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-14)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-16)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-17)         result = await crawler.arun(url="https://news.ycombinator.com", config=config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-18)         print("Cleaned HTML length:", len(result.cleaned_html)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-19) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-20) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-114-21)     asyncio.run(main())`

3\. Handling Iframes
--------------------

Some sites embed content in `<iframe>` tags. If you want that inline:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-115-1) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-115-2)     # Merge iframe content into the final output [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-115-3)     process_iframes=True,     [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-115-4)     remove_overlay_elements=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-115-5) )`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-5)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-6)         process_iframes=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-7)         remove_overlay_elements=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-9)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-10)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-11)             url="https://example.org/iframe-demo",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-12)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-13)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-14)         print("Iframe-merged length:", len(result.cleaned_html)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-16) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-116-17)     asyncio.run(main())`

3.1 Flattening Shadow DOM
-------------------------

Sites built with **Web Components** (Stencil, Lit, Shoelace, Angular Elements, etc.) render content inside Shadow DOM — an encapsulated sub-tree invisible to `page.content()`. Set `flatten_shadow_dom=True` to extract it:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-117-1) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-117-2)     flatten_shadow_dom=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-117-3)     wait_until="load", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-117-4)     delay_before_return_html=3.0,  # give components time to hydrate [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-117-5) )`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-5)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-6)         flatten_shadow_dom=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-7)         wait_until="load", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-8)         delay_before_return_html=3.0, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-9)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-10)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-11)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-12)             url="https://store.boschrexroth.com/en/us/p/hydraulic-cylinder-r900999011", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-13)             config=config, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-14)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-15)         # Without flatten_shadow_dom: ~1 KB markdown (breadcrumbs only) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-16)         # With flatten_shadow_dom:   ~33 KB (product description, specs, downloads) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-17)         print(len(result.markdown.raw_markdown)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-19) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-118-20)     asyncio.run(main())`

When enabled, Crawl4AI also injects an init script that force-opens closed shadow roots. The flattener resolves `<slot>` projections and strips shadow-scoped `<style>` tags, producing clean HTML for the downstream scraping/markdown pipeline.

**Execution order**: `flatten_shadow_dom` runs right before HTML capture, after all waits and JS execution:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-119-1) js_code_before_wait → wait_for → delay → js_code → flatten_shadow_dom → page capture`

For a full runnable example, see [`shadow_dom_crawling.py`](https://github.com/unclecode/crawl4ai/blob/main/docs/examples/shadow_dom_crawling.py)
.

4\. Structured Extraction Examples
----------------------------------

### 4.1 Pattern-Based with `JsonCssExtractionStrategy`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-2) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-3) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-4) from crawl4ai import JsonCssExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-6) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-7)     # Minimal schema for repeated items [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-8)     schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-9)         "name": "News Items", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-10)         "baseSelector": "tr.athing", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-11)         "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-12)             {"name": "title", "selector": "span.titleline a", "type": "text"}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-13)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-14)                 "name": "link",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-15)                 "selector": "span.titleline a",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-16)                 "type": "attribute",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-17)                 "attribute": "href" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-18)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-19)         ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-20)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-21) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-22)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-23)         # Content filtering [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-24)         excluded_tags=["form", "header"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-25)         exclude_domains=["adsite.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-26) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-27)         # CSS selection or entire page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-28)         css_selector="table.itemlist", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-29) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-30)         # No caching for demonstration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-31)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-32) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-33)         # Extraction strategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-34)         extraction_strategy=JsonCssExtractionStrategy(schema) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-35)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-36) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-37)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-38)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-39)             url="https://news.ycombinator.com/newest",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-40)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-41)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-42)         data = json.loads(result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-43)         print("Sample extracted item:", data[:1])  # Show first item [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-44) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-45) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-120-46)     asyncio.run(main())`

### 4.2 LLM-Based Extraction

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-2) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-3) from pydantic import BaseModel, Field [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-4) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, LLMConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-5) from crawl4ai import LLMExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-7) class ArticleData(BaseModel): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-8)     headline: str [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-9)     summary: str [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-11) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-12)     llm_strategy = LLMExtractionStrategy( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-13)         llm_config = LLMConfig(provider="openai/gpt-4",api_token="sk-YOUR_API_KEY") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-14)         schema=ArticleData.schema(), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-15)         extraction_type="schema", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-16)         instruction="Extract 'headline' and a short 'summary' from the content." [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-17)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-19)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-20)         exclude_external_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-21)         word_count_threshold=20, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-22)         extraction_strategy=llm_strategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-23)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-24) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-25)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-26)         result = await crawler.arun(url="https://news.ycombinator.com", config=config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-27)         article = json.loads(result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-28)         print(article) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-29) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-30) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-121-31)     asyncio.run(main())`

\- Filters out external links (`exclude_external_links=True`).  
\- Ignores very short text blocks (`word_count_threshold=20`).  
\- Passes the final HTML to your LLM strategy for an AI-driven parse.

5\. Comprehensive Example
-------------------------

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-2) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-3) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-4) from crawl4ai import JsonCssExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-6) async def extract_main_articles(url: str): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-7)     schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-8)         "name": "ArticleBlock", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-9)         "baseSelector": "div.article-block", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-10)         "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-11)             {"name": "headline", "selector": "h2", "type": "text"}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-12)             {"name": "summary", "selector": ".summary", "type": "text"}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-13)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-14)                 "name": "metadata", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-15)                 "type": "nested", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-16)                 "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-17)                     {"name": "author", "selector": ".author", "type": "text"}, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-18)                     {"name": "date", "selector": ".date", "type": "text"} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-19)                 ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-20)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-21)         ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-22)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-24)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-25)         # Keep only #main-content [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-26)         css_selector="#main-content", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-27) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-28)         # Filtering [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-29)         word_count_threshold=10, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-30)         excluded_tags=["nav", "footer"],   [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-31)         exclude_external_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-32)         exclude_domains=["somebadsite.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-33)         exclude_external_images=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-34) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-35)         # Extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-36)         extraction_strategy=JsonCssExtractionStrategy(schema), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-37) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-38)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-39)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-40) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-41)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-42)         result = await crawler.arun(url=url, config=config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-43)         if not result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-44)             print(f"Error: {result.error_message}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-45)             return None [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-46)         return json.loads(result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-47) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-48) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-49)     articles = await extract_main_articles("https://news.ycombinator.com/newest") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-50)     if articles: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-51)         print("Extracted Articles:", articles[:2])  # Show first 2 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-52) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-53) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-122-54)     asyncio.run(main())`

\- **CSS** scoping with `#main-content`.  
\- Multiple **exclude\_** parameters to remove domains, external images, etc.  
\- A **JsonCssExtractionStrategy** to parse repeated article blocks.

6\. Scraping Modes
------------------

Crawl4AI uses `LXMLWebScrapingStrategy` (LXML-based) as the default scraping strategy for HTML content processing. This strategy offers excellent performance, especially for large HTML documents. **Note:** For backward compatibility, `WebScrapingStrategy` is still available as an alias for `LXMLWebScrapingStrategy`.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-1) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, LXMLWebScrapingStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-3) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-4)     # Default configuration already uses LXMLWebScrapingStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-5)     config = CrawlerRunConfig() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-7)     # Or explicitly specify it if desired [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-8)     config_explicit = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-9)         scraping_strategy=LXMLWebScrapingStrategy() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-10)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-12)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-13)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-14)             url="https://example.com",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-15)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-123-16)         )`

You can also create your own custom scraping strategy by inheriting from `ContentScrapingStrategy`. The strategy must return a `ScrapingResult` object with the following structure:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-1) from crawl4ai import ContentScrapingStrategy, ScrapingResult, MediaItem, Media, Link, Links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-3) class CustomScrapingStrategy(ContentScrapingStrategy): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-4)     def scrap(self, url: str, html: str, **kwargs) -> ScrapingResult: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-5)         # Implement your custom scraping logic here [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-6)         return ScrapingResult( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-7)             cleaned_html="<html>...</html>",  # Cleaned HTML content [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-8)             success=True,                     # Whether scraping was successful [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-9)             media=Media( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-10)                 images=[                      # List of images found [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-11)                     MediaItem( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-12)                         src="https://example.com/image.jpg", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-13)                         alt="Image description", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-14)                         desc="Surrounding text", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-15)                         score=1, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-16)                         type="image", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-17)                         group_id=1, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-18)                         format="jpg", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-19)                         width=800 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-20)                     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-21)                 ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-22)                 videos=[],                    # List of videos (same structure as images) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-23)                 audios=[]                     # List of audio files (same structure as images) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-24)             ), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-25)             links=Links( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-26)                 internal=[                    # List of internal links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-27)                     Link( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-28)                         href="https://example.com/page", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-29)                         text="Link text", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-30)                         title="Link title", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-31)                         base_domain="example.com" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-32)                     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-33)                 ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-34)                 external=[]                   # List of external links (same structure) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-35)             ), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-36)             metadata={                        # Additional metadata [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-37)                 "title": "Page Title", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-38)                 "description": "Page description" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-39)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-40)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-41) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-42)     async def ascrap(self, url: str, html: str, **kwargs) -> ScrapingResult: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-43)         # For simple cases, you can use the sync version [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-124-44)         return await asyncio.to_thread(self.scrap, url, html, **kwargs)`

### Performance Considerations

*   Fast processing of large HTML documents (especially >100KB)
*   Efficient memory usage
*   Good handling of well-formed HTML
*   Robust table detection and extraction

### Backward Compatibility

For users upgrading from earlier versions: - `WebScrapingStrategy` is now an alias for `LXMLWebScrapingStrategy` - Existing code using `WebScrapingStrategy` will continue to work without modification - No changes are required to your existing code

7\. Combining CSS Selection Methods
-----------------------------------

You can combine `css_selector` and `target_elements` in powerful ways to achieve fine-grained control over your output:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-5)     # Target specific content but preserve page context [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-6)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-7)         # Focus markdown on main content and sidebar [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-8)         target_elements=["#main-content", ".sidebar"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-10)         # Global filters applied to entire page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-11)         excluded_tags=["nav", "footer", "header"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-12)         exclude_external_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-13) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-14)         # Use basic content thresholds [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-15)         word_count_threshold=15, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-16) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-17)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-18)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-19) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-20)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-21)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-22)             url="https://example.com/article", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-23)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-24)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-26)         print(f"Content focuses on specific elements, but all links still analyzed") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-27)         print(f"Internal links: {len(result.links.get('internal', []))}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-28)         print(f"External links: {len(result.links.get('external', []))}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-29) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-30) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-125-31)     asyncio.run(main())`

\- Links, images and other page data still give you the full context of the page - Content filtering still applies globally

8\. Conclusion
--------------

By mixing **target\_elements** or **css\_selector** scoping, **content filtering** parameters, and advanced **extraction strategies**, you can precisely **choose** which data to keep. Key parameters in **`CrawlerRunConfig`** for content selection include: 1. **`target_elements`** – Array of CSS selectors to focus markdown generation and data extraction, while preserving full page context for links and media. 2. **`css_selector`** – Basic scoping to an element or region for all extraction processes.  
3\. **`word_count_threshold`** – Skip short blocks.  
4\. **`excluded_tags`** – Remove entire HTML tags.  
5\. **`exclude_external_links`**, **`exclude_social_media_links`**, **`exclude_domains`** – Filter out unwanted links or domains.  
6\. **`exclude_external_images`** – Remove images from external sources.  
7\. **`process_iframes`** – Merge iframe content if needed.

Page Interaction
================

1.  Click “Load More” buttons
2.  Fill forms and submit them
3.  Wait for elements or data to appear
4.  Reuse sessions across multiple steps

1\. JavaScript Execution
------------------------

### Basic Execution

**`js_code`** in **`CrawlerRunConfig`** accepts either a single JS string or a list of JS snippets.  

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-5)     # Single JS command [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-6)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-7)         js_code="window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-10)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-11)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-12)             url="https://news.ycombinator.com",  # Example site [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-13)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-14)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-15)         print("Crawled length:", len(result.cleaned_html)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-16) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-17)     # Multiple commands [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-18)     js_commands = [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-19)         "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-20)         # 'More' link on Hacker News [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-21)         "document.querySelector('a.morelink')?.click();",   [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-22)     ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-23)     config = CrawlerRunConfig(js_code=js_commands) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-24) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-25)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-26)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-27)             url="https://news.ycombinator.com",  # Another pass [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-28)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-29)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-30)         print("After scroll+click, length:", len(result.cleaned_html)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-31) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-32) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-126-33)     asyncio.run(main())`

**Relevant `CrawlerRunConfig` params**: - **`js_code`**: A string or list of strings with JavaScript to run after the page loads. - **`js_only`**: If set to `True` on subsequent calls, indicates we’re continuing an existing session without a new full navigation.  
\- **`session_id`**: If you want to keep the same page across multiple calls, specify an ID.

2\. Wait Conditions
-------------------

### 2.1 CSS-Based Waiting

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-5)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-6)         # Wait for at least 30 items on Hacker News [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-7)         wait_for="css:.athing:nth-child(30)"   [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-9)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-10)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-11)             url="https://news.ycombinator.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-12)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-13)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-14)         print("We have at least 30 items loaded!") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-15)         # Rough check [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-16)         print("Total items in HTML:", result.cleaned_html.count("athing"))   [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-17) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-18) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-127-19)     asyncio.run(main())`

\- **`wait_for="css:..."`**: Tells the crawler to wait until that CSS selector is present.

### 2.2 JavaScript-Based Waiting

For more complex conditions (e.g., waiting for content length to exceed a threshold), prefix `js:`:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-128-1) wait_condition = """() => { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-128-2)     const items = document.querySelectorAll('.athing'); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-128-3)     return items.length > 50;  // Wait for at least 51 items [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-128-4) }""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-128-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-128-6) config = CrawlerRunConfig(wait_for=f"js:{wait_condition}")`

**Behind the Scenes**: Crawl4AI keeps polling the JS function until it returns `true` or a timeout occurs.

3\. Handling Dynamic Content
----------------------------

### 3.1 Load More Example (Hacker News “More” Link)

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-5)     # Step 1: Load initial Hacker News page [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-6)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-7)         wait_for="css:.athing:nth-child(30)"  # Wait for 30 items [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-9)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-10)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-11)             url="https://news.ycombinator.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-12)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-13)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-14)         print("Initial items loaded.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-16)         # Step 2: Let's scroll and click the "More" link [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-17)         load_more_js = [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-18)             "window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight);", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-19)             # The "More" link at page bottom [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-20)             "document.querySelector('a.morelink')?.click();"   [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-21)         ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-22) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-23)         next_page_conf = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-24)             js_code=load_more_js, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-25)             wait_for="""js:() => { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-26)                 return document.querySelectorAll('.athing').length > 30; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-27)             }""", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-28)             # Mark that we do not re-navigate, but run JS in the same session: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-29)             js_only=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-30)             session_id="hn_session" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-31)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-32) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-33)         # Re-use the same crawler session [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-34)         result2 = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-35)             url="https://news.ycombinator.com",  # same URL but continuing session [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-36)             config=next_page_conf [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-37)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-38)         total_items = result2.cleaned_html.count("athing") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-39)         print("Items after load-more:", total_items) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-40) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-41) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-129-42)     asyncio.run(main())`

\- **`session_id="hn_session"`**: Keep the same page across multiple calls to `arun()`. - **`js_only=True`**: We’re not performing a full reload, just applying JS in the existing page. - **`wait_for`** with `js:`: Wait for item count to grow beyond 30.

### 3.2 Form Interaction

If the site has a search or login form, you can fill fields and submit them with **`js_code`**. For instance, if GitHub had a local search form:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-1) js_form_interaction = """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-2) document.querySelector('#your-search').value = 'TypeScript commits'; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-3) document.querySelector('form').submit(); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-4) """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-6) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-7)     js_code=js_form_interaction, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-8)     wait_for="css:.commit" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-9) ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-130-10) result = await crawler.arun(url="https://github.com/search", config=config)`

4\. Timing Control
------------------

1. **`page_timeout`** (ms): Overall page load or script execution time limit.  
2. **`delay_before_return_html`** (seconds): Wait an extra moment before capturing the final HTML.  
3. **`mean_delay`** & **`max_range`**: If you call `arun_many()` with multiple URLs, these add a random pause between each request.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-131-1) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-131-2)     page_timeout=60000,  # 60s limit [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-131-3)     delay_before_return_html=2.5 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-131-4) )`

5\. Multi-Step Interaction Example
----------------------------------

Below is a simplified script that does multiple “Load More” clicks on GitHub’s TypeScript commits page. It **re-uses** the same session to accumulate new commits each time. The code includes the relevant **`CrawlerRunConfig`** parameters you’d rely on.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-4) async def multi_page_commits(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-5)     browser_cfg = BrowserConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-6)         headless=False,  # Visible for demonstration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-7)         verbose=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-9)     session_id = "github_ts_commits" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-11)     base_wait = """js:() => { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-12)         const commits = document.querySelectorAll('li.Box-sc-g0xbh4-0 h4'); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-13)         return commits.length > 0; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-14)     }""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-16)     # Step 1: Load initial commits [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-17)     config1 = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-18)         wait_for=base_wait, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-19)         session_id=session_id, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-20)         cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-21)         # Not using js_only yet since it's our first load [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-22)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-23) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-24)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(config=browser_cfg) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-25)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-26)             url="https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/commits/main", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-27)             config=config1 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-28)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-29)         print("Initial commits loaded. Count:", result.cleaned_html.count("commit")) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-30) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-31)         # Step 2: For subsequent pages, we run JS to click 'Next Page' if it exists [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-32)         js_next_page = """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-33)         const selector = 'a[data-testid="pagination-next-button"]'; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-34)         const button = document.querySelector(selector); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-35)         if (button) button.click(); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-36)         """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-37) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-38)         # Wait until new commits appear [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-39)         wait_for_more = """js:() => { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-40)             const commits = document.querySelectorAll('li.Box-sc-g0xbh4-0 h4'); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-41)             if (!window.firstCommit && commits.length>0) { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-42)                 window.firstCommit = commits[0].textContent; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-43)                 return false; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-44)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-45)             // If top commit changes, we have new commits [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-46)             const topNow = commits[0]?.textContent.trim(); [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-47)             return topNow && topNow !== window.firstCommit; [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-48)         }""" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-49) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-50)         for page in range(2):  # let's do 2 more "Next" pages [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-51)             config_next = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-52)                 session_id=session_id, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-53)                 js_code=js_next_page, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-54)                 wait_for=wait_for_more, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-55)                 js_only=True,       # We're continuing from the open tab [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-56)                 cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-57)             ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-58)             result2 = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-59)                 url="https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/commits/main", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-60)                 config=config_next [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-61)             ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-62)             print(f"Page {page+2} commits count:", result2.cleaned_html.count("commit")) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-63) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-64)         # Optionally kill session [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-65)         await crawler.crawler_strategy.kill_session(session_id) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-66) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-67) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-68)     await multi_page_commits() [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-69) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-70) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-132-71)     asyncio.run(main())`

\- **`session_id`**: Keep the same page open.  
\- **`js_code`** + **`wait_for`** + **`js_only=True`**: We do partial refreshes, waiting for new commits to appear.  
\- **`cache_mode=CacheMode.BYPASS`** ensures we always see fresh data each step.

6\. Combine Interaction with Extraction
---------------------------------------

Once dynamic content is loaded, you can attach an **`extraction_strategy`** (like `JsonCssExtractionStrategy` or `LLMExtractionStrategy`). For example:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-1) from crawl4ai import JsonCssExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-3) schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-4)     "name": "Commits", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-5)     "baseSelector": "li.Box-sc-g0xbh4-0", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-6)     "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-7)         {"name": "title", "selector": "h4.markdown-title", "type": "text"} [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-8)     ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-9) } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-10) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-11)     session_id="ts_commits_session", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-12)     js_code=js_next_page, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-13)     wait_for=wait_for_more, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-14)     extraction_strategy=JsonCssExtractionStrategy(schema) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-133-15) )`

When done, check `result.extracted_content` for the JSON.

7\. Relevant `CrawlerRunConfig` Parameters
------------------------------------------

Below are the key interaction-related parameters in `CrawlerRunConfig`. For a full list, see [Configuration Parameters](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/api/parameters.md)
. - **`js_code`**: JavaScript to run after initial load.  
\- **`js_only`**: If `True`, no new page navigation—only JS in the existing session.  
\- **`wait_for`**: CSS (`"css:..."`) or JS (`"js:..."`) expression to wait for.  
\- **`session_id`**: Reuse the same page across calls.  
\- **`cache_mode`**: Whether to read/write from the cache or bypass.  
\- **`remove_overlay_elements`**: Remove certain popups automatically. - **`remove_consent_popups`**: Remove GDPR/cookie consent popups from known CMP providers (OneTrust, Cookiebot, Didomi, etc.). - **`simulate_user`, `override_navigator`, `magic`**: Anti-bot or "human-like" interactions.

8\. Conclusion
--------------

1. **Execute JavaScript** for scrolling, clicks, or form filling.  
2. **Wait** for CSS or custom JS conditions before capturing data.  
4\. Combine with **structured extraction** for dynamic sites.

9\. Virtual Scrolling
---------------------

For sites that use **virtual scrolling** (where content is replaced rather than appended as you scroll, like Twitter or Instagram), Crawl4AI provides a dedicated `VirtualScrollConfig`:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-1) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, VirtualScrollConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-3) async def crawl_twitter_timeline(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-4)     # Configure virtual scroll for Twitter-like feeds [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-5)     virtual_config = VirtualScrollConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-6)         container_selector="[data-testid='primaryColumn']",  # Twitter's main column [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-7)         scroll_count=30,                # Scroll 30 times [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-8)         scroll_by="container_height",   # Scroll by container height each time [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-9)         wait_after_scroll=1.0          # Wait 1 second after each scroll [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-10)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-12)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-13)         virtual_scroll_config=virtual_config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-14)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-16)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-17)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-18)             url="https://twitter.com/search?q=AI", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-19)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-20)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-134-21)         # result.html now contains ALL tweets from the virtual scroll`

### Virtual Scroll vs JavaScript Scrolling

| Feature | Virtual Scroll | JS Code Scrolling |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Use Case** | Content replaced during scroll | Content appended or simple scroll |
| **Configuration** | `VirtualScrollConfig` object | `js_code` with scroll commands |
| **Automatic Merging** | Yes - merges all unique content | No - captures final state only |
| **Best For** | Twitter, Instagram, virtual tables | Traditional pages, load more buttons |

Link & Media
============

1.  Extract links (internal, external) from crawled pages
2.  Filter or exclude specific domains (e.g., social media or custom domains)
3.  Access and ma### 3.2 Excluding Images
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-135-1) crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-135-2)     exclude_external_images=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-135-3) )`
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-136-1) crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-136-2)     exclude_all_images=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-136-3) )`
    
4.  You don't need image data in your results
5.  You're crawling image-heavy pages that cause memory issues
6.  You want to focus only on text content
7.  Configure your crawler to exclude or prioritize certain images Below is a revised version of the **Link Extraction** and **Media Extraction** sections that includes example data structures showing how links and media items are stored in `CrawlResult`. Feel free to adjust any field names or descriptions to match your actual output.

1\. Link Extraction
-------------------

### 1.1 `result.links`

When you call `arun()` or `arun_many()` on a URL, Crawl4AI automatically extracts links and stores them in the `links` field of `CrawlResult`. By default, the crawler tries to distinguish **internal** links (same domain) from **external** links (different domains).

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-1) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-3) async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-4)     result = await crawler.arun("https://www.example.com") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-5)     if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-6)         internal_links = result.links.get("internal", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-7)         external_links = result.links.get("external", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-8)         print(f"Found {len(internal_links)} internal links.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-9)         print(f"Found {len(internal_links)} external links.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-10)         print(f"Found {len(result.media)} media items.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-12)         # Each link is typically a dictionary with fields like: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-13)         # { "href": "...", "text": "...", "title": "...", "base_domain": "..." } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-14)         if internal_links: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-15)             print("Sample Internal Link:", internal_links[0]) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-16)     else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-137-17)         print("Crawl failed:", result.error_message)`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-1) result.links = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-2)   "internal": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-3)     { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-4)       "href": "https://kidocode.com/", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-5)       "text": "", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-6)       "title": "", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-7)       "base_domain": "kidocode.com" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-8)     }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-9)     { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-10)       "href": "https://kidocode.com/degrees/technology", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-11)       "text": "Technology Degree", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-12)       "title": "KidoCode Tech Program", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-13)       "base_domain": "kidocode.com" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-14)     }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-15)     # ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-16)   ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-17)   "external": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-18)     # possibly other links leading to third-party sites [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-19)   ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-138-20) }`

\- **`href`**: The raw hyperlink URL.  
\- **`text`**: The link text (if any) within the `<a>` tag.  
\- **`title`**: The `title` attribute of the link (if present).  
\- **`base_domain`**: The domain extracted from `href`. Helpful for filtering or grouping by domain.

2\. Advanced Link Head Extraction & Scoring
-------------------------------------------

Ever wanted to not just extract links, but also get the actual content (title, description, metadata) from those linked pages? And score them for relevance? This is exactly what Link Head Extraction does - it fetches the `<head>` section from each discovered link and scores them using multiple algorithms.

### 2.1 Why Link Head Extraction?

1.  **Fetching head content** from each link (title, description, meta tags)
2.  **Combining scores intelligently** to give you a final relevance ranking

### 2.2 Complete Working Example

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-3) from crawl4ai import LinkPreviewConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-4) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-5) async def extract_link_heads_example(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-6)     """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-7)     Complete example showing link head extraction with scoring. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-8)     This will crawl a documentation site and extract head content from internal links. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-9)     """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-10) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-11)     # Configure link head extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-12)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-13)         # Enable link head extraction with detailed configuration [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-14)         link_preview_config=LinkPreviewConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-15)             include_internal=True,           # Extract from internal links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-16)             include_external=False,          # Skip external links for this example [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-17)             max_links=10,                   # Limit to 10 links for demo [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-18)             concurrency=5,                  # Process 5 links simultaneously [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-19)             timeout=10,                     # 10 second timeout per link [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-20)             query="API documentation guide", # Query for contextual scoring [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-21)             score_threshold=0.3,            # Only include links scoring above 0.3 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-22)             verbose=True                    # Show detailed progress [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-23)         ), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-24)         # Enable intrinsic scoring (URL quality, text relevance) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-25)         score_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-26)         # Keep output clean [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-27)         only_text=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-28)         verbose=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-29)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-30) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-31)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-32)         #
