Crawl a documentation site (great for testing) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-33)         result = await crawler.arun("https://docs.python.org/3/", config=config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-34) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-35)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-36)             print(f"✅ Successfully crawled: {result.url}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-37)             print(f"📄 Page title: {result.metadata.get('title', 'No title')}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-38) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-39)             # Access links (now enhanced with head data and scores) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-40)             internal_links = result.links.get("internal", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-41)             external_links = result.links.get("external", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-42) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-43)             print(f"\n🔗 Found {len(internal_links)} internal links") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-44)             print(f"🌍 Found {len(external_links)} external links") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-45) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-46)             # Count links with head data [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-47)             links_with_head = [link for link in internal_links  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-48)                              if link.get("head_data") is not None] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-49)             print(f"🧠 Links with head data extracted: {len(links_with_head)}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-50) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-51)             # Show the top 3 scoring links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-52)             print(f"\n🏆 Top 3 Links with Full Scoring:") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-53)             for i, link in enumerate(links_with_head[:3]): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-54)                 print(f"\n{i+1}. {link['href']}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-55)                 print(f"   Link Text: '{link.get('text', 'No text')[:50]}...'") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-56) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-57)                 # Show all three score types [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-58)                 intrinsic = link.get('intrinsic_score') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-59)                 contextual = link.get('contextual_score')  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-60)                 total = link.get('total_score') [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-61) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-62)                 if intrinsic is not None: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-63)                     print(f"   📊 Intrinsic Score: {intrinsic:.2f}/10.0 (URL quality & context)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-64)                 if contextual is not None: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-65)                     print(f"   🎯 Contextual Score: {contextual:.3f} (BM25 relevance to query)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-66)                 if total is not None: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-67)                     print(f"   ⭐ Total Score: {total:.3f} (combined final score)") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-68) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-69)                 # Show extracted head data [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-70)                 head_data = link.get("head_data", {}) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-71)                 if head_data: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-72)                     title = head_data.get("title", "No title") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-73)                     description = head_data.get("meta", {}).get("description", "No description") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-74) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-75)                     print(f"   📰 Title: {title[:60]}...") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-76)                     if description: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-77)                         print(f"   📝 Description: {description[:80]}...") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-78) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-79)                     # Show extraction status [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-80)                     status = link.get("head_extraction_status", "unknown") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-81)                     print(f"   ✅ Extraction Status: {status}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-82)         else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-83)             print(f"❌ Crawl failed: {result.error_message}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-84) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-85) # Run the example [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-86) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-139-87)     asyncio.run(extract_link_heads_example())`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-1) ✅ Successfully crawled: https://docs.python.org/3/ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-2) 📄 Page title: 3.13.5 Documentation [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-3) 🔗 Found 53 internal links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-4) 🌍 Found 1 external links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-5) 🧠 Links with head data extracted: 10 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-7) 🏆 Top 3 Links with Full Scoring: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-9) 1. https://docs.python.org/3.15/ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-10)    Link Text: 'Python 3.15 (in development)...' [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-11)    📊 Intrinsic Score: 4.17/10.0 (URL quality & context) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-12)    🎯 Contextual Score: 1.000 (BM25 relevance to query) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-13)    ⭐ Total Score: 5.917 (combined final score) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-14)    📰 Title: 3.15.0a0 Documentation... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-15)    📝 Description: The official Python documentation... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-140-16)    ✅ Extraction Status: valid`

### 2.3 Configuration Deep Dive

The `LinkPreviewConfig` class supports these options:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-1) from crawl4ai import LinkPreviewConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-2) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-3) link_preview_config = LinkPreviewConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-4)     # BASIC SETTINGS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-5)     verbose=True,                    # Show detailed logs (recommended for learning) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-7)     # LINK FILTERING [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-8)     include_internal=True,           # Include same-domain links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-9)     include_external=True,           # Include different-domain links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-10)     max_links=50,                   # Maximum links to process (prevents overload) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-12)     # PATTERN FILTERING [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-13)     include_patterns=[               # Only process links matching these patterns [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-14)         "*/docs/*",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-15)         "*/api/*",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-16)         "*/reference/*" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-17)     ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-18)     exclude_patterns=[               # Skip links matching these patterns [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-19)         "*/login*", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-20)         "*/admin*" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-21)     ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-22) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-23)     # PERFORMANCE SETTINGS [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-24)     concurrency=10,                  # How many links to process simultaneously [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-25)     timeout=5,                      # Seconds to wait per link [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-26) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-27)     # RELEVANCE SCORING [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-28)     query="machine learning API",    # Query for BM25 contextual scoring [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-29)     score_threshold=0.3,            # Only include links above this score [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-141-30) )`

### 2.4 Understanding the Three Score Types

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-1) # High intrinsic score indicators: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-2) # ✅ Clean URL structure (docs.python.org/api/reference) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-3) # ✅ Meaningful link text ("API Reference Guide") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-4) # ✅ Relevant to page context [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-5) # ✅ Not buried deep in navigation [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-6) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-7) # Low intrinsic score indicators: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-8) # ❌ Random URLs (site.com/x7f9g2h) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-9) # ❌ No link text or generic text ("Click here") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-142-10) # ❌ Unrelated to page content`

Only available when you provide a `query`. Uses BM25 algorithm against head content:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-143-1) # Example: query = "machine learning tutorial" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-143-2) # High contextual score: Link to "Complete Machine Learning Guide" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-143-3) # Low contextual score: Link to "Privacy Policy"`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-144-1) # When both scores available: (intrinsic * 0.3) + (contextual * 0.7) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-144-2) # When only intrinsic: uses intrinsic score [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-144-3) # When only contextual: uses contextual score [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-144-4) # When neither: not calculated`

### 2.5 Practical Use Cases

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-1) async def research_assistant(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-2)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-3)         link_preview_config=LinkPreviewConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-4)             include_internal=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-5)             include_external=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-6)             include_patterns=["*/docs/*", "*/tutorial/*", "*/guide/*"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-7)             query="machine learning neural networks", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-8)             max_links=20, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-9)             score_threshold=0.5,  # Only high-relevance links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-10)             verbose=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-11)         ), [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-12)         score_links=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-13)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-14) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-15)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-16)         result = await crawler.arun("https://scikit-learn.org/", config=config) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-17) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-18)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-145-19)             # Analyze intrinsic scores [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-18)             scores = [link.get('intrinsic_score', 0) for link in links] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-19)             avg_score = sum(scores) / len(scores) if scores else 0 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-20) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-21)             print(f"📊 Link Quality Analysis:") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-22)             print(f"   Average intrinsic score: {avg_score:.2f}/10.0") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-23)             print(f"   High quality links (>7.0): {len([s for s in scores if s > 7.0])}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-24)             print(f"   Low quality links (<3.0): {len([s for s in scores if s < 3.0])}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-25) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-26)             # Find problematic links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-27)             bad_links = [link for link in links  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-28)                         if link.get('intrinsic_score', 0) < 2.0] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-29) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-30)             if bad_links: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-31)                 print(f"\n⚠️  Links needing attention:") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-32)                 for link in bad_links[:5]: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-147-33)                     print(f"   {link['href']} (score: {link.get('intrinsic_score', 0):.1f})")`

### 2.6 Performance Tips

1.  **Start Small**: Begin with `max_links: 10` to understand the feature
2.  **Use Patterns**: Filter with `include_patterns` to focus on relevant sections
3.  **Adjust Concurrency**: Higher concurrency = faster but more resource usage
4.  **Set Timeouts**: Use `timeout: 5` to prevent hanging on slow sites
5.  **Use Score Thresholds**: Filter out low-quality links with `score_threshold`

### 2.7 Troubleshooting

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-148-1) # Check your configuration: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-148-2) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-148-3)     link_preview_config=LinkPreviewConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-148-4)         verbose=True   # ← Enable to see what's happening [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-148-5)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-148-6) )`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-1) # Make sure scoring is enabled: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-2) config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-3)     score_links=True,  # ← Enable intrinsic scoring [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-4)     link_preview_config=LinkPreviewConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-5)         query="your search terms"  # ← For contextual scoring [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-6)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-149-7) )`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-1) # Optimize performance: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-2) link_preview_config = LinkPreviewConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-3)     max_links=20,      # ← Reduce number [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-4)     concurrency=10,    # ← Increase parallelism [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-5)     timeout=3,         # ← Shorter timeout [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-6)     include_patterns=["*/important/*"]  # ← Focus on key areas [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-150-7) )`

3\. Domain Filtering
--------------------

Some websites contain hundreds of third-party or affiliate links. You can filter out certain domains at **crawl time** by configuring the crawler. The most relevant parameters in `CrawlerRunConfig` are: - **`exclude_external_links`**: If `True`, discard any link pointing outside the root domain.  
\- **`exclude_social_media_domains`**: Provide a list of social media platforms (e.g., `["facebook.com", "twitter.com"]`) to exclude from your crawl.  
\- **`exclude_social_media_links`**: If `True`, automatically skip known social platforms.  
\- **`exclude_domains`**: Provide a list of custom domains you want to exclude (e.g., `["spammyads.com", "tracker.net"]`).

### 3.1 Example: Excluding External & Social Media Links

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-5)     crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-6)         exclude_external_links=True,          # No links outside primary domain [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-7)         exclude_social_media_links=True       # Skip recognized social media domains [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-8)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-9) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-10)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-11)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-12)             "https://www.example.com", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-13)             config=crawler_cfg [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-14)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-15)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-16)             print("[OK] Crawled:", result.url) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-17)             print("Internal links count:", len(result.links.get("internal", []))) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-18)             print("External links count:", len(result.links.get("external", [])))   [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-19)             # Likely zero external links in this scenario [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-20)         else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-21)             print("[ERROR]", result.error_message) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-22) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-23) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-151-24)     asyncio.run(main())`

### 3.2 Example: Excluding Specific Domains

If you want to let external links in, but specifically exclude a domain (e.g., `suspiciousads.com`), do this:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-152-1) crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-152-2)     exclude_domains=["suspiciousads.com"] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-152-3) )`

4\. Media Extraction
--------------------

### 4.1 Accessing `result.media`

By default, Crawl4AI collects images, audio and video URLs it finds on the page. These are stored in `result.media`, a dictionary keyed by media type (e.g., `images`, `videos`, `audio`). **Note: Tables have been moved from `result.media["tables"]` to the new `result.tables` format for better organization and direct access.**

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-1) if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-2)     # Get images [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-3)     images_info = result.media.get("images", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-4)     print(f"Found {len(images_info)} images in total.") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-5)     for i, img in enumerate(images_info[:3]):  # Inspect just the first 3 [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-6)         print(f"[Image {i}] URL: {img['src']}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-7)         print(f"           Alt text: {img.get('alt', '')}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-8)         print(f"           Score: {img.get('score')}") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-153-9)         print(f"           Description: {img.get('desc', '')}\n")`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-1) result.media = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-2)   "images": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-3)     { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-4)       "src": "https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/.../Group%2089.svg", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-5)       "alt": "coding school for kids", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-6)       "desc": "Trial Class Degrees degrees All Degrees AI Degree Technology ...", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-7)       "score": 3, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-8)       "type": "image", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-9)       "group_id": 0, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-10)       "format": None, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-11)       "width": None, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-12)       "height": None [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-13)     }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-14)     # ... [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-15)   ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-16)   "videos": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-17)     # Similar structure but with video-specific fields [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-18)   ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-19)   "audio": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-20)     # Similar structure but with audio-specific fields [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-21)   ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-154-22) }`

\- **`src`**: The media URL (e.g., image source)  
\- **`alt`**: The alt text for images (if present)  
\- **`desc`**: A snippet of nearby text or a short description (optional)  
\- **`score`**: A heuristic relevance score if you’re using content-scoring features  
\- **`width`**, **`height`**: If the crawler detects dimensions for the image/video  
\- **`type`**: Usually `"image"`, `"video"`, or `"audio"`  
\- **`group_id`**: If you’re grouping related media items, the crawler might assign an ID

### 4.2 Excluding External Images

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-155-1) crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-155-2)     exclude_external_images=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-155-3) )`

### 4.3 Additional Media Config

*   **`screenshot`**: Set to `True` if you want a full-page screenshot stored as `base64` in `result.screenshot`.
*   **`pdf`**: Set to `True` if you want a PDF version of the page in `result.pdf`.
*   **`capture_mhtml`**: Set to `True` if you want an MHTML snapshot of the page in `result.mhtml`. This format preserves the entire web page with all its resources (CSS, images, scripts) in a single file, making it perfect for archiving or offline viewing.
*   **`wait_for_images`**: If `True`, attempts to wait until images are fully loaded before final extraction.
    
    `[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-5)     crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-6)         capture_mhtml=True  # Enable MHTML capture [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-7)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-8) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-9)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-10)         result = await crawler.arun("https://example.com", config=crawler_cfg) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-11) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-12)         if result.success and result.mhtml: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-13)             # Save the MHTML snapshot to a file [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-14)             with open("example.mhtml", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-15)                 f.write(result.mhtml) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-16)             print("MHTML snapshot saved to example.mhtml") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-17)         else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-18)             print("Failed to capture MHTML:", result.error_message) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-19) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-20) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-156-21)     asyncio.run(main())`
    
*   It captures the complete page state including all resources
*   It can be opened in most modern browsers for offline viewing
*   It preserves the page exactly as it appeared during crawling
*   It's a single file, making it easy to store and transfer

5\. Putting It All Together: Link & Media Filtering
---------------------------------------------------

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-1) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-2) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, BrowserConfig, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-3) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-4) async def main(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-5)     # Suppose we want to keep only internal links, remove certain domains,  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-6)     # and discard external images from the final crawl data. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-7)     crawler_cfg = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-8)         exclude_external_links=True, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-9)         exclude_domains=["spammyads.com"], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-10)         exclude_social_media_links=True,   # skip Twitter, Facebook, etc. [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-11)         exclude_external_images=True,      # keep only images from main domain [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-12)         wait_for_images=True,             # ensure images are loaded [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-13)         verbose=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-14)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-15) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-16)     async with AsyncWebCrawler() as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-17)         result = await crawler.arun("https://www.example.com", config=crawler_cfg) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-18) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-19)         if result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-20)             print("[OK] Crawled:", result.url) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-21) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-22)             # 1. Links [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-23)             in_links = result.links.get("internal", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-24)             ext_links = result.links.get("external", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-25)             print("Internal link count:", len(in_links)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-26)             print("External link count:", len(ext_links))  # should be zero with exclude_external_links=True [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-27) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-28)             # 2. Images [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-29)             images = result.media.get("images", []) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-30)             print("Images found:", len(images)) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-31) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-32)             # Let's see a snippet of these images [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-33)             for i, img in enumerate(images[:3]): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-34)                 print(f"  - {img['src']} (alt={img.get('alt','')}, score={img.get('score','N/A')})") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-35)         else: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-36)             print("[ERROR] Failed to crawl. Reason:", result.error_message) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-37) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-38) if __name__ == "__main__": [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-157-39)     asyncio.run(main())`

6\. Common Pitfalls & Tips
--------------------------

1. **Conflicting Flags**:  
\- `exclude_external_links=True` but then also specifying `exclude_social_media_links=True` is typically fine, but understand that the first setting already discards _all_ external links. The second becomes somewhat redundant.  
\- `exclude_external_images=True` but want to keep some external images? Currently no partial domain-based setting for images, so you might need a custom approach or hook logic. 2. **Relevancy Scores**:  
\- If your version of Crawl4AI or your scraping strategy includes an `img["score"]`, it’s typically a heuristic based on size, position, or content analysis. Evaluate carefully if you rely on it. 3. **Performance**:  
4. **Social Media Lists**:  
\- `exclude_social_media_links=True` typically references an internal list of known social domains like Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, etc. If you need to add or remove from that list, look for library settings or a local config file (depending on your version).

Extraction Strategies
=====================

Extracting JSON (No LLM)
========================

1.  **Schema-based extraction** with CSS or XPath selectors via `JsonCssExtractionStrategy` and `JsonXPathExtractionStrategy`
2.  **Regular expression extraction** with `RegexExtractionStrategy` for fast pattern matching
3.  **Faster & Cheaper**: No API calls or GPU overhead.

1\. Intro to Schema-Based Extraction
------------------------------------

1.  **Nested** or **list** types for repeated or hierarchical structures.

2\. Simple Example: Crypto Prices
---------------------------------

Let's begin with a **simple** schema-based extraction using the `JsonCssExtractionStrategy`. Below is a snippet that extracts cryptocurrency prices from a site (similar to the legacy Coinbase example). Notice we **don't** call any LLM:

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-1) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-2) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-3) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig, CacheMode [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-4) from crawl4ai import JsonCssExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-6) async def extract_crypto_prices(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-7)     # 1. Define a simple extraction schema [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-8)     schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-9)         "name": "Crypto Prices", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-10)         "baseSelector": "div.crypto-row",    # Repeated elements [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-11)         "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-12)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-13)                 "name": "coin_name", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-14)                 "selector": "h2.coin-name", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-15)                 "type": "text" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-16)             }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-17)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-18)                 "name": "price", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-19)                 "selector": "span.coin-price", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-20)                 "type": "text" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-21)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-22)         ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-23)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-24) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-25)     # 2. Create the extraction strategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-26)     extraction_strategy = JsonCssExtractionStrategy(schema, verbose=True) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-27) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-28)     # 3. Set up your crawler config (if needed) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-29)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-30)         # e.g., pass js_code or wait_for if the page is dynamic [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-31)         # wait_for="css:.crypto-row:nth-child(20)" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-32)         cache_mode = CacheMode.BYPASS, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-33)         extraction_strategy=extraction_strategy, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-34)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-35) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-36)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(verbose=True) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-37)         # 4. Run the crawl and extraction [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-38)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-39)             url="https://example.com/crypto-prices", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-40) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-41)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-42)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-43) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-44)         if not result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-45)             print("Crawl failed:", result.error_message) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-46)             return [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-47) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-48)         # 5. Parse the extracted JSON [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-49)         data = json.loads(result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-50)         print(f"Extracted {len(data)} coin entries") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-51)         print(json.dumps(data[0], indent=2) if data else "No data found") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-52) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-158-53) asyncio.run(extract_crypto_prices())`

\- **`baseSelector`**: Tells us where each "item" (crypto row) is.  
\- **`fields`**: Two fields (`coin_name`, `price`) using simple CSS selectors.  
\- Each field defines a **`type`** (e.g., `text`, `attribute`, `html`, `regex`, etc.).

### **XPath Example with `raw://` HTML**

Below is a short example demonstrating **XPath** extraction plus the **`raw://`** scheme. We'll pass a **dummy HTML** directly (no network request) and define the extraction strategy in `CrawlerRunConfig`.

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-1) import json [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-2) import asyncio [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-3) from crawl4ai import AsyncWebCrawler, CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-4) from crawl4ai import JsonXPathExtractionStrategy [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-5) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-6) async def extract_crypto_prices_xpath(): [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-7)     # 1. Minimal dummy HTML with some repeating rows [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-8)     dummy_html = """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-9)     <html> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-10)       <body> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-11)         <div class='crypto-row'> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-12)           <h2 class='coin-name'>Bitcoin</h2> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-13)           <span class='coin-price'>$28,000</span> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-14)         </div> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-15)         <div class='crypto-row'> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-16)           <h2 class='coin-name'>Ethereum</h2> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-17)           <span class='coin-price'>$1,800</span> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-18)         </div> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-19)       </body> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-20)     </html> [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-21)     """ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-22) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-23)     # 2. Define the JSON schema (XPath version) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-24)     schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-25)         "name": "Crypto Prices via XPath", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-26)         "baseSelector": "//div[@class='crypto-row']", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-27)         "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-28)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-29)                 "name": "coin_name", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-30)                 "selector": ".//h2[@class='coin-name']", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-31)                 "type": "text" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-32)             }, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-33)             { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-34)                 "name": "price", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-35)                 "selector": ".//span[@class='coin-price']", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-36)                 "type": "text" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-37)             } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-38)         ] [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-39)     } [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-40) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-41)     # 3. Place the strategy in the CrawlerRunConfig [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-42)     config = CrawlerRunConfig( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-43)         extraction_strategy=JsonXPathExtractionStrategy(schema, verbose=True) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-44)     ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-45) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-46)     # 4. Use raw:// scheme to pass dummy_html directly [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-47)     raw_url = f"raw://{dummy_html}" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-48) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-49)     async with AsyncWebCrawler(verbose=True) as crawler: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-50)         result = await crawler.arun( [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-51)             url=raw_url, [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-52)             config=config [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-53)         ) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-54) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-55)         if not result.success: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-56)             print("Crawl failed:", result.error_message) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-57)             return [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-58) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-59)         data = json.loads(result.extracted_content) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-60)         print(f"Extracted {len(data)} coin rows") [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-61)         if data: [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-62)             print("First item:", data[0]) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-63) [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-159-64) asyncio.run(extract_crypto_prices_xpath())`

1\. **`JsonXPathExtractionStrategy`** is used instead of `JsonCssExtractionStrategy`.  
2\. **`baseSelector`** and each field's `"selector"` use **XPath** instead of CSS.  
3\. **`raw://`** lets us pass `dummy_html` with no real network request—handy for local testing.  
4\. Everything (including the extraction strategy) is in **`CrawlerRunConfig`**.  
That's how you keep the config self-contained, illustrate **XPath** usage, and demonstrate the **raw** scheme for direct HTML input—all while avoiding the old approach of passing `extraction_strategy` directly to `arun()`.

3\. Advanced Schema & Nested Structures
---------------------------------------

### Sample E-Commerce HTML

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-160-1) https://gist.githubusercontent.com/githubusercontent/2d7b8ba3cd8ab6cf3c8da771ddb36878/raw/1ae2f90c6861ce7dd84cc50d3df9920dee5e1fd2/sample_ecommerce.html`

`[](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-1) schema = { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-2)     "name": "E-commerce Product Catalog", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-3)     "baseSelector": "div.category", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-4)     # (1) We can define optional baseFields if we want to extract attributes  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-5)     # from the category container [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-6)     "baseFields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-7)         {"name": "data_cat_id", "type": "attribute", "attribute": "data-cat-id"},  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-8)     ], [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-9)     "fields": [ [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-10)         { [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-11)             "name": "category_name", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-12)             "selector": "h2.category-name", [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-13)             "type": "text"                   "name": "rating",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-67)                             "selector": "span.rating",  [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-68)                             "type": "text" [](https://docs.crawl4ai.com/complete-sdk-reference/#__codelineno-161-69)
